title: YouTube and Viral Shorts Video Editor
description:
My name is Melanie Guintu, and I’m a travel vlogger focused on sharing authentic, real-life experiences around the world.



I’m currently looking for a video editor to help with:

• Long-form YouTube videos

• Short-form content (YouTube Shorts, TikTok, Reels)



My editing style is not overly flashy. I value:

• Strong storytelling

• Clean, intentional cuts

• Emotional connection

• Relatable, real 
nts



The goal is to create engaging, binge-worthy content that keeps viewers watching and performs well on YouTube. I’m also looking for someone who can clip long-form videos into viral Shorts and Reels.



Typical weekly output:

• 2 YouTube videos (~1 hour each)

• 5
 videos (3–5 minutes each)

• 10 Shorts/Reels (30–60 seconds each)



My travel vlogs are filmed in a more raw live stream style, so the editing focus is less on heavy effects and more on:

• Cutting out slower or unnecessary 
nts

• Maintaining strong pacing and flow

• Shaping the footage into a clear, engaging storyline



I’m looking for someone who:

• Understands YouTube pacing, retention, and viewer psychology

• Can structure footage into a compelling story (not just basic edits)

• Knows how to hook viewers in the first few seconds and maintain attention throughout

• Can add captions, music, and occasional effects/sound design to enhance engagement (without overdoing it)



Bonus if you:

• Have experience editing travel or vlog-style content

• Understand viral content and short-form clipping



I’d like to start with a small test project, and if it’s a good fit, continue working together long-term.



If you’re interested, please send:

 1. Examples of your work (especially YouTube content)

 2. Your rate per video or per hour

 3. Your turnaround time



Start your message with “sunshine” so I know you read this.



Looking forward to working together!

Best,

Melanie Guintu ????

lanieguintu

Instagram: instagram.co
lanieguintu

.co

title: Video Editor — YouTube Finance Channel
description:
About the Role

I run a YouTube channel focused on AI and finance (50 videos, growing fast). I need a video editor to take over the editing and publishing workflow so I can focus on recording and scripting.



This is a long-term, part-time role, with potential for full-time ~6 months out. You'll edit 4-6 videos per week, each 4-12 minutes long. The style is locked in — I'll give you example videos, CapCut project files with my preferred settings, and access to my Canva account for thumbnails.



Your normal working hours (Philippine time, 8am-5pm) are perfect. I record during my morning in the US (CST), drop raw footage in a shared Google Drive folder, and you edit during your daytime. Your 5pm is my 4am — I wake up to finished cuts ready to review.



What You'll Do



Edit raw screen recordings + face cam footage in CapCut

Follow established editing style (cuts, zooms, text overlays, transitions — all demonstrated in example files)

Create thumbnails using existing Canva templates

Add titles, descriptions, tags, and timestamps (I'll provide a template)

Light audio cleanup (noise reduction, level balancing — nothing complex)

Turnaround: 24 hours from raw footage drop to finished edit in the Drive folder



What I'll Provide



10+ example videos showing the exact editing style

CapCut project files with my settings, fonts, and color scheme

Canva account access with thumbnail templates

Google Drive folder structure for file handoff

Video description template with standard CTA, links, and formatting

Slack or
 for 
 communication



Requirements



Strong CapCut editing skills (this is non-negotiable — we don't use Premiere or Final Cut)

Experience editing YouTube tutorial/educational content

Reliable internet and ability to handle large video files

Can start within 1 week

Available 20-25 hours/week



Nice to Have (not required)



Familiarity with finance/business content

Experience with Canva for thumbnail design

Basic understanding of YouTube SEO (titles, tags, descriptions)

Experience cutting long-form content into YouTube Shorts/TikTok/Reels



Compensation

$
/month USD depending on experience, paid biweekly via Wise or PayPal. This is a long-term role with room to grow as the channel scales.

Growth path: Phase 1 is long-form video editing. Within 30 days, we'll add cutting long-form videos into YouTube Shorts (vertical, 30-60 seconds). More scope = higher pay.

How to Apply

Send me:



A link to 2-3 YouTube videos you've edited (educational/tutorial style preferred)

A short Loom video (under 2 minutes) showing how you'd approach editing a screen recording tutorial

Your CapCut experience level and how many videos you typically edit per week



I'll send a paid test edit ($25) to my top 3 candidates using actual raw footage from my channel.

title: Video Editor for E-Commerce Ads (UGC / Performance Marketing)
description:
We are a fast-growing e-commerce brand based in Sweden, focused on performance marketing and scaling through high-quality ad creatives.



We are now looking for a high-level video editor who can help us produce UGC-style ads, performance creatives, and iterations based on data.



This is NOT just basic editing.

We are building a creative system — and you will be a key part of it.



---



What You Will Do

 • Edit short-form video ads (TikTok / Meta / Reels)

 • Work from structured briefs (script, hooks, angles)

 • Create 3 variations per concept

 • Iterate on winning ads based on performance data

 • Add subtitles, pacing, hooks, and visual elements to improve retention

 • Turn raw footage + voiceovers into high-converting ads



---



What We Expect From You

 • Strong skills in Premiere Pro or DaVinci Resolve

 • Experience editing UGC ads or performance marketing creatives

 • Good understanding of:

 • Hooks (first 1–3 seconds)

 • Pacing

 • Retention

 • Ability to work independently without micromanagement

 • Someone who takes initiative and improves things without being told

 • Fast, reliable, and consistent



---



IMPORTANT – THIS ROLE IS FOR YOU IF:

 • You want to grow long-term with a brand

 • You are hungry to improve and get better every week

 • You enjoy creative work AND performance-based thinking



---



THIS ROLE IS NOT FOR YOU IF:

 • You need step-by-step instructions for everything

 • You only do “basic editing”

 • You are slow or inconsistent



---



Trial Task (IMPORTANT)



To apply, you will receive:

 • Raw video clips

 • Voiceover

 • Script



Your job:

Create ONE finished ad



You will NOT get detailed instructions.

We want to see how you think, structure, and execute.



---



Work Schedule

 • Flexible

 • Expected output: 2–5 videos per day depending on workload

 • Long-term opportunity for full-time work



---



Salary

 • $600/month (starting)

 • Performance-based increases over time



---



Future Opportunities



You will grow into a key role in our creative team, including:

 • Creative strategy input

 • Scaling winning ads

 • Testing new concepts

 • Potential leadership role



---



How to Apply



Please include:

 1. Short introduction about yourself

 2. Your experience with video editing

 3. Examples of ads you’ve created (VERY IMPORTANT)

 4. What software you use

 5. Why you want to work with us

title: Travel Funnel & Facebook Ads Specialist (Group Travel – High Performance Role)
description:

 Ads Specialist to help us fill a 15–20 traveler luxury South Africa group (June 2026).

This is NOT a basic virtual assistant role.

We are looking for someone who can generate PAID bookings, not just leads.

Fill 15–20 travelers

Timeline: 60 days (30-day accelerated bonus available)

Focus on converting leads into paid clients



Responsibilities

Build a high-converting landing page in Go High Level

Integrate Stripe payment links (service fee required before booking)

Launch and manage
 & Instagram ad campaigns

Generate qualified leads and convert them into paid bookings

Optimize campaigns daily for performance

Track and report daily/weekly results (leads, bookings, cost per conversion)



 Communication & Follow-Up (REQUIRED)

Daily follow-up with all leads is REQUIRED

All new leads must be contacted within a few hours

Follow-ups must continue until conversion or disqualification

Provide daily updates on:

Leads generated

Follow-ups completed

Paid bookings



 Ad Account & Transparency Requirements

You must run ads using your own
 ad account

You must provide access to view campaign performance (Ads Manager or shared reporting)

Full transparency on ad spend and results is REQUIRED

Must be comfortable managing and scaling ad budgets



Compensation

$4–$6/hour (base)

Performance Bonus:

$500 bonus for filling 20 paid bookings within 60 days

$1,000 bonus if 20 bookings are filled within 30 days

Additional bonuses and long-term opportunities available for future group projects.



Requirements (MUST HAVE)

Proven experience running
 Ads with results

Experience building funnels (Go High Level preferred)

Strong understanding of conversion optimization

Experience generating SALES (not just leads)

 To Apply, Answer:

Experience with Stripe integrations



We are looking for a long-term partner. If you perform well, you will manage multiple group launches with us.

title: Collections Manager
description:
WFH

Graveyard Shift

1 year contract



Position Overview



Job Description

The Collections Manager is responsible for overseeing the accounts receivable collections process to ensure timely payment of invoices and maintain healthy cash flow. This role manages the collections team, monitors aging reports, resolves payment issues with clients, and works closely with accounting, billing, and operations teams to reduce outstanding receivables.



The Collections Manager will implement structured follow-up procedures, monitor collection performance metrics, and ensure accurate documentation of all collection activities.



Key Responsibilities:

Accounts Receivable & Collections Management

- Manage the full accounts receivable collections process for all client accounts.

-Monitor AR aging reports and identify overdue balances.

- Ensure consistent follow-up on past due invoices through
, phone calls, and formal notices.

- Prioritize high-value and high-risk accounts to reduce outstanding balances.

-  Work with clients to resolve billing disputes and payment issues.

- Negotiate payment plans when necessary.



Team Leadership

- Manage and supervise the collections team.

- Assign accounts and collection priorities.

- Train tea
mbers on collection procedures and systems.

- Monitor team performance and ensure collection targets are met.



Reporting & Analysis

- Produce weekly and monthly collections reports.

- Track KPIs such as:

          Days Sales Outstanding (DSO)

          Collection rate

          Aging trends

         Top delinquent accounts

- Present reports and updates to senior management.



Cross-Department Coordination

- Work closely with:

       Finance & Accounting

      Billing

      Sales

     Operations



- Ensure invoices are accurate and disputes are resolved quickly.

- Coordinate with accounting to apply payments correctly in QuickBooks.



Process Improvement

- Develop and implement improved collections procedures.

- Identify inefficiencies in billing or invoicing processes that delay payments.

- Implement automation and reporting tools where appropriate.



Compliance & Documentation

- Ensure all collection activity is properly documented.

- Maintain accurate client communication records.

- Ensure collection practices comply with company policies and applicable laws.



Qualifications

Experience

- 5+ years of experience in accounts receivable or collections.

- 2+ years managing a collections team preferred.

- Experience with large commercial accounts and high invoice volumes.



Technical Skills

- Experience with QuickBooks or similar accounting software.

- Strong knowledge of AR aging and collections strategies.

- Proficiency with Excel and financial reporting tools.



Soft Skills

- Strong negotiation and communication skills.

- High attention to detail.

- Ability to manage multiple priorities.

- Strong problem-solving and conflict resolution skills.



Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)

- The Collections Manager will be evaluated based on:

- Reduction in Days Sales Outstanding (DSO)

- Monthly collections percentage

- Reduction of 90+ day receivables

- Resolution time for billing disputes

- Accuracy of AR reporting

- Team productivity and performance



Send your resume to

title: AI Video Generator & Animator (VEO 3.1 Professional)
description:
We are an aggressively growing eCommerce and Retail brand looking for a highly skilled AI Video Generator Professional to join our creative team full-time. 



Your primary focus will be leveraging advanced AI video generation tools—specifically VEO 3.1—to create high-converting, hyper-realistic, and visually stunning video content for our marketing campaigns, Amazon A+ Premium Content, TikTok Shop, and Meta ads.

- Generate, edit, and refine high-quality AI video content using VEO 3.1 and other cutting-edge AI video tools.

- Turn static images, text prompts, and existing brand assets into dynamic, engaging video ads.

- Iterate rapidly on video creatives based on performance feedback from our Paid Media Buyers.

- Maintain a consistent brand aesthetic and high production value across all generated content.

- Stay up-to-date with the latest advancements in AI video generation, prompt engineering, and digital marketing trends.



Requirements:



- Proven experience and high proficiency with Google VEO (specifically VEO 3.1) or similar top-tier AI video generators (Sora, Runway Gen-3, Midjourney to Video workflows, etc.).

title: Marketing Collateral and Design Specialist
description:
Facial Spa

Remote Marketing Collateral & Conceptual Designer Application



We’re looking for a creative powerhouse—someone who doesn’t just make things look good, but makes them feel aligned, elevated, and intentional.



This role is perfect for a designer + thinker who understands branding, storytelling, and conversion—and can bring ideas to life across digital and print.



? About the Role



As our Marketing Collateral & Conceptual Designer, you will be responsible for creating visually compelling and strategically aligned materials that support our campaigns, partnerships, and client experience.



You will help translate ideas into:



Elevated visuals

Branded campaigns

Seamless client-facing experiences



This is a remote, flexible position with project-based and ongoing opportunities.



???? Key Responsibilities

Design branded marketing materials:

Social media graphics & campaigns

 visuals & layouts

Flyers, brochures, and in-spa print pieces

Event and partnership decks

Website visuals and landing page assets

Translate concepts into visual storytelling:

Campaign themes (CLEAR · RESTORE · RELAX · LIFT)

Seasonal launches and promotions

Educational and service-based visuals

Work within brand colors, typography, and visual identity

Collaborate on marketing ideas:

Bring creative direction—not just execution

Offer layout, messaging, and campaign suggestions

Support ongoing initiatives:

Membership promotions

Product launches

Partnership campaigns (fitness, wellness, lifestyle brands)

???? Who You Are

A concept-driven creative (not just a template user)

Strong eye for luxury, minimal, elevated design

Understands branding, marketing psychology, and client experience

Detail-oriented and organized

Able to take direction—and also lead creatively

Comfortable working remotely and communicating clearly

????? Skills & Tools

Required Proficiency:

Adobe Creative Suite (Photoshop, InDesign, Illustrator)

Adobe Illustrator (vector design, logo refinement, layout precision)

Canva (Advanced) (quick-turn marketing assets, templates, social content)

Bonus Skills:

Experience with beauty, wellness, or lifestyle brands

Understanding of social media marketing trends

Light copywriting or layout messaging skills

???? What We Value

title: LinkedIn Content Manager & Strategist (HNWI & Finance Niche)
description:
LinkedIn Content Manager & Strategist (HNWI & Finance Niche)







About Us:



We are a premium marketing agency specializing in HNWI acquisition for fund managers and family offices. Our founder has a 35,000+ follower platform. We are looking for a right-hand marketing manager to turn our industry insights into a high-authority media machine.







The Mission:



You won’t just be "posting." You will be managing the digital reputation of a thought leader in the private equity and wealth management space.







Scope of Work:







• Content Extraction: Transforming founder voice notes/briefs into 5-7 high-authority LinkedIn posts per week.







• Visual Storytelling: Creating "clean, minimalist" carousels and data-driven visuals (Not flashy/generic).







• The "Surround Sound" Strategy: 20x daily strategic comments on "Whale" accounts (Fund Managers/LPs) to drive profile views.







• The Lead Magnet: Compiling 1x weekly "Investor Intelligence Report" for giveaway campaigns.







• Institutional Presence: 1x weekly "Trust-building" update on our Company Page.







What we are looking for:







• Sophisticated Writing: You hate "AI-sounding" fluff. You write with brevity and punch.







• Financial Literacy: You understand the difference between an LP and a GP, and you know what AU
ans.







• Consistency: You are obsessed with the "Daily" streak.







Growth hacking: ability to create strong hooks so that posts go viral, and strategies to increase followers.







Compensation: $500 / month.







Questions 



Since you are specialing in finance, ask these "Filter Questions" to see if they actually know the industry:







1. "Give me a 2-sentence 'hook' for a post about why Family Offices are moving away from traditional hedge funds." (Tests writing + finance knowledge).







3. "How do you handle negative or 'troll' comments on a high-authority post?"







Will you leverage artificial intelligence? Is so.. how, and which tools?







What are your top 3 biggest achievements in LinkedIn marketing?







What is your experience, specifically with Investment Finance?

title: HIRING: Experienced Airbnb / STR Operations Specialist
description:
Full-Time | Long-Term | Remote



Hi! - We are hiring an experienced Airbnb / STR Operations Specialist for our growing short-term rental company based in Las Vegas.



This is NOT an entry-level VA role.



We are looking for someone who already has real, recent hands-on experience in Airbnb / STR operations and can step in quickly with minimal hand-holding.



We will teach you our SOPs, standards, workflows, and how we like things done — but you should already know about 90% of the job.



WHAT YOU’LL BE RESPONSIBLE FOR:



* Airbnb guest communication

* Guest issue handling and customer service

* Post-checkout calls

* Difficult guest situations

* Refund requests and review protection

* Vendor coordination

* Work orders and operations follow-up

* Taking over teammates’ shifts on their days off

* Pushing open issues to final completion

* Using slow periods wisely to follow up, clean up loose ends, and reduce future problems



WHO WE’RE LOOKING FOR:



* Strong recent STR / Airbnb experience

* Comfortable using Airbnb, Guesty, Slack, Gmail, and Google Sheets/Docs

* Strong written and spoken English

* Calm under pressure

* Professional with guests and vendors

* Proactive and self-managed

* Strong follow-through

* Organized and detail-oriented

* Urgent and responsive

* Able to think independently instead of waiting to be told every next step



YOU MAY BE A GREAT FIT IF YOU NATURALLY THINK LIKE THIS:



* What can I finalize today?

* What still needs follow-up?

* Who do I need to call?

* What is still unresolved?

* What can I clean up while it’s quiet?

* What can I do now to reduce tomorrow’s problems?



DO NOT APPLY IF:



* You do not have real Airbnb / STR experience

* You are currently working another client during this shift

* You still need basic training before becoming useful

* You wait for instructions instead of taking ownership

* You get overwhelmed easily

* You avoid difficult conversations with guests or vendors

* You are weak on follow-up, urgency, or closure



SCHEDULE

Philippines Time



* Monday: 9:00 AM – 7:00 PM

* Tuesday: OFF

* Wednesday: 11:00 PM – 9:00 AM

* Thursday: 11:00 PM – 9:00 AM

* Friday: OFF

* Saturday: 9:00 AM – 7:00 PM

* Sunday: OFF



Please apply only if you can commit to this exact schedule consistently.



PAY:



* $5/hour

* Opportunity for increased pay over time based on performance, reliability, ownership, and growth



WHY THIS ROLE IS A GREAT OPPORTUNITY:

This is not just a task-based VA job.



This is a long-term opportunity to become an important part of a growing Airbnb / STR operation. We are looking for someone reliable, experienced, and proactive who wants to grow with the company and become truly valuable over time.



HOW TO APPLY? 

* Please complete our questionnaire here: 

* Only candidates who complete the questionnaire and follow instructions carefully will be considered.

title: REMOTE PARALEGAL/LEGAL ASSISTANT
description:
Legal Document Preparation & Filing



Draft, review, and finalize legal documents including complaints, petitions, motions, declarations, and responses across all practice areas

Prepare California Judicial Council forms (e.g., FL-311, UD-100, SUM-100, POS-010, FW-001) using correct annotation/overlay methods

Format pleadings using California pleading paper standards (28-line numbered format, Courier New caption, Times New Roman body, proper margins)

Prepare Proofs of Service (POS-010) for each defendant served, ensuring all items are correctly completed

Organize and assemble documents for e-filing and physical filing with California Superior Courts

Manage client "To eFile" folders and ensure documents are court-ready before submission



Case & Client Management



Maintain organized digital case files for each client within the firm's folder structure (organized by practice area and client name)

Track case deadlines, court dates, hearing schedules, and filing due dates

Communicate with clients via
 and phone to gather information, provide updates, and answer procedural questions

Manage client intake for new matters, including initial document collection and file setup

Coordinate with process servers and track service of process across defendants



Legal Research & Analysis



Conduct California legal research using FindLaw, Sacramento County Law Library resources, Westlaw, or similar platforms

Research relevant California statutes, case law, and court rules to support motions and briefs

Review and summarize case law and statutory authorities for use in legal memoranda and court filings

Monitor changes in California court rules and local rules for courts where cases are filed



Court Procedures & Compliance



Ensure all filings comply with California Rules of Court and applicable local rules

Prepare fee waiver applications (FW-001) and supporting documentation when applicable

Calendar and track statutory deadlines (e.g., response times, discovery cutoffs, trial dates)

Coordinate e-filing submissions through California court e-filing portals



Administrative & Operations Support



Maintain the firm's legal library (forms, books, guides) organized by practice area

Assist with billing, invoicing, and time tracking for client matters

Support business development by preparing marketing materials, client-facing documents, and intake workflows

Manage correspondence and follow up on outstanding items across all active cases





Practice Areas You Will Support



Family Law: Custody, visitation, support, dissolution, ex parte applications

Unlawful Detainer: Eviction complaints, responses, motions, trial preparation

Civil Litigation: General complaints, cross-complaints, discovery, motions, trial prep

Wills & Trusts: Will drafting, trust preparation, estate planning documents

Bankruptcy: Chapter 7 and Chapter 13 petition preparation and schedules

Consumer Protection: Demand letters, complaints, statutory claims

Employment Law: Wage claims, discrimination complaints, demand letters

Real Estate: Purchase agreements, dispute resolution, landlord-tenant issues

Qualifications

Required:



Paralegal certificate, legal assistant diploma, or equivalent legal education (law degree from any jurisdiction is a plus)

Minimum 2 years of experience in a paralegal, legal assistant, or legal document preparation role

Working knowledge of U.S. legal systems, particularly California state court procedures

Professional-level English proficiency (written and verbal) — you will draft legal documents and communicate with U.S. clients

Strong attention to detail with the ability to produce error-free legal documents

Excellent organizational and time-management skills; ability to manage multiple cases simultaneously

Proficiency with document management, cloud storage, and digital filing systems

Reliable high-speed internet connection and a dedicated, professional workspace

Availability to work during U.S. Pacific Time business hours (at least partial overlap)



Preferred:



Experience with California Judicial Council forms and e-filing systems

Familiarity with California Rules of Court and local court rules (especially Los Angeles and Orange County)

Prior remote work experience with a U.S.-based law firm or legal services company

Bilingual in English and Spanish or Filipino/Tagalog (a significant asset for client communication)

Experience with legal research databases (FindLaw, Westlaw, LexisNexis)

Knowledge of California family law, unlawful detainer, or civil litigation procedures





Software & Tools

You will be expected to work with the following platforms and tools (training provided where needed):

Document Preparation & Editing



Microsoft Word / LibreOffice Writer — drafting pleadings, motions, and legal documents

Adobe Acrobat / PDF editing tools — form annotation, PDF assembly, and court-ready formatting

Google Workspace (Docs, Sheets, Drive) — collaboration, spreadsheets, and cloud storage



Case & Practice Management



Clio / MyCase / PracticePanther (or similar) — case management, calendaring, and time tracking

Google Calendar — deadline tracking and scheduling

Cloud-based file management systems — organized by practice area and client



Legal Research & Filing



FindLaw / Westlaw / LexisNexis — case law and statutory research

California Courts e-filing portals — electronic court filings

PACER (Federal) — federal case lookup and document retrieval



Communication & Productivity



Gmail / Google Workspace — primary
 and client communication

Zoom / Google Meet — virtual meetings with clients and team

Slack / Microsoft Teams — internal team communication

AI-assisted tools (Claude, ChatGPT) — legal research augmentation and document drafting support





Compensation & Benefits



Salary: Competitive and commensurate with experience (paid in USD)

Schedule: Flexible working hours with required overlap during U.S. Pacific Time business hours

Growth: Opportunity to grow into a senior paralegal or operations management role as the firm expands

Training: Ongoing training on California court procedures, legal technology, and practice-area-specific knowledge

Environment: Fully remote position with a collaborative, supportive team culture





How to Apply

Interested candidates should submit the following:



Updated resume or CV highlighting relevant legal experience

Cover letter explaining your interest in the role and your experience with U.S. legal document preparation

Writing sample (a legal document you have prepared, with confidential information redacted)

References from previous legal employers or clients (optional but encouraged)





Clause and Effect is an equal opportunity employer. We welcome applicants from all backgrounds and are committed to building a diverse, inclusive team.

title: Graphic Designer (Procreate + Video Creation)
description:
We are looking for a talented and creative Graphic Designer to join our team. Your primary responsibility will be to design high-quality mockups for digital product websites, helping bring our products to life visually and making them shine online.



ABOUT THE ROLE:

This is a full-time remote position where you will work closely with our product and marketing teams to create compelling visual assets. You will be at the heart of how our digital products are presented to the world.



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES:

- Design professional mockups for digital product pages, landing pages, and sales pages

- Create eye-catching product preview images and promotional graphics using Procreate

- Produce short video content, reels, and promotional videos to showcase digital products

- Develop consistent visual branding across all digital touchpoints

- Collaborate with the team to conceptualize and iterate on design ideas

- Deliver assets in formats optimized for web and social media platforms

- Maintain organized files and design assets for easy team access



REQUIRED SKILLS & EXPERIENCE:

- Proficient in Procreate (iPad-based illustration and design)

- Experience creating and editing videos (reels, promos, product showcases)

- Strong understanding of design principles, typography, and color theory

- Experience creating mockups for digital products (eBooks, templates, courses, etc.)

- A strong portfolio demonstrating both graphic design and video work

- Attention to detail and ability to meet deadlines

- Good communication skills in English



WHAT WE OFFER:

- Stable, long-term Part-time position

- Remote work from home

- Collaborative and supportive team environment

- Opportunity to grow with the business



Please include a link to your portfolio or examples of your work when applying. We especially want to see mockups, digital product designs, and any videos you have created.

title: Google Ads Management
description:
We are a growing digital marketing agency specializing in eCommerce and consumer brands, and we are looking for a Google Ads Manager who can take true ownership of campaign performance.



This role is not just about managing bids and budgets. We are looking for someone who can analyze performance, identify opportunities, and guide creative direction to improve results.



If you are someone who understands that great performance comes from the combination of data + messaging + creative, this role is for you.



You will be responsible for managing and optimizing Google Ads campaigns across Search, Performance Max, Display, and YouTube.



More importantly, you will be expected to:



+ Identify performance bottlenecks

+ Recommend strategic changes

+ Guide creative direction based on data

+ Communicate clearly about what is working and what needs to change



We value proactive thinking and accountability.



We are not looking for someone who waits for instructions—we are looking for someone who can lead performance improvements.



CORE RESPONSIBILITIES 



- Build, manage, and optimize Google Ads campaigns (Search, PMax, Display, YouTube)

- Monitor performance daily and make optimization decisions

- Manage budgets and pacing to ensure efficient spend

- Improve key performance metrics such as:

--ROAS

--CPA

--Conversion Rate

--Click-Through Rate

--Cost per Click

-Conduct keyword research and search term analysis

-Implement negative keyword strategies

-Optimize bidding strategies and audience targeting





Required Qualifications

5+ years managing Google Ads campaigns

Proven experience improving ROAS or lowering CPA

Strong analytical and problem-solving skills

Experience with:

Google Ads

GA4

Conversion tracking

Keyword research

A/B testing

Strong written English communication

Ability to explain performance clearly and concisely

title: Senior Marketing & Operations Partner (Luxury Real Estate)
description:
The Role in a Nutshell



This is not a copy-and-paste role. I am looking for a resourceful, technically fearless Virtual Assistant or Marketing Assistant to own the execution of my marketing and operations. I am a luxury real estate agent specializing in Park City, Utah—a high-stakes, highly specific investment market serving high-net-worth clients relocating from the Bay Area, LA, and NYC.

You will not be micromanaged. Instead, you will be given access to world-class coaching resources, templates, and tools. Your job is to be the "Quarterback"—taking those resources, adapting them for a sophisticated, data-aware audience, and turning them into polished content, engaging social media, and efficient systems.



The Philosophy: Ownership over Instructions



* Self-Directed Learner: If a tool is new to you, that's on you to figure out—using AI, YouTube, and whatever else it takes to get up to speed on your own time. The expectation is that you are resourceful enough to reduce your own learning curve. If you need to be told what to do every step of the way, this is not the right fit.

* High Standards: You understand that "good enough" doesn't work for $5M+ listings. You have an eye for luxury aesthetics, a creative mindset, and a commitment to accuracy across all marketing materials.

* Proactive & Professional: You are highly organized, consistently meet deadlines, flag issues, surface ideas, and communicate proactively without being prompted.



Core Responsibilities



* The Resource Orchestrator: Dive into my top-tier real estate coaching platforms to extract relevant strategies and templates. You will "team up" with these resources to execute a world-class marketing strategy.

* Social Media Management: Create high-quality, engaging content across LinkedIn, Instagram,
, YouTube, and Google Business Profile. You will follow a detailed schedule and align all visual output with our luxury brand identity.

*
 Marketing & Newsletters: Own the Mailchimp workflow. Build and send polished weekly campaigns that keep us top-of-mind with a high-net-worth database.

* AI-Assisted Blogging: Write, format, and publish SEO-optimized blog posts directly to WordPress using AI tools and Make.com automations. The goal is original-feeling insight, not "bot-generated" output.

* Web Management: Maintain and update content on a Squarespace website, including landing pages, listings, and other web assets as needed.

* Asset & CRM Management: Act as the digital librarian for our Dropbox (managing high-res photos and 4K video) and assist in the setup and optimization of our CRM to ensure leads are tagged and followed up with.

* Performance Tracking: Monitor engagement across platforms using analytics tools, distilling the data into actionable insights to guide our strategy.

* Market Intelligence: Proactively research Park City market trends, seasonal rhythms, and luxury developments. This isn't knowledge I will hand you; it's research you will do and bring back.





Required Technical Qualifications



* Proven Experience: Background as a VA, Marketing Assistant, or similar role in a real estate setting, with specific responsibility for social media management, content creation, and performance tracking.

* Design & Video: Proficiency in design software (Canva, Adobe Creative Suite, or equivalent) and the ability to edit long-form video into high-quality, short-form reels/snippets.

* Scheduling & Analytics: Experience with social media scheduling tools (Buffer, Hootsuite, Later, etc.) and native platform analytics.

* Web CMS Knowledge: Comfortable in WordPress (publishing/formatting) and Squarespace (page management).

* AI Sophistication: Proven ability to use ChatGPT, Claude, or Midjourney in a sophisticated way—adapting outputs meaningfully rather than posting raw generations.

* Automation Familiarity: Experience building or managing Make.com workflows for content automation.

* Executive Communication: Excellent written and verbal communication skills with an understanding of SEO basics and white-glove client standards.

* Availability: Available to work primarily during Mountain Time business hours.

Preferred Skills

* Previous experience working directly within a real estate company’s marketing department.

* Deep knowledge of current social media trends, particularly for real estate and luxury marketing.

* Familiarity with both digital and print marketing best practices for real estate.



How to Apply (Please Read Carefully)

To prove you have the attention to detail required for the luxury real estate market, you must follow these specific instructions. Applications that fail to follow these formatting rules will be archived without review.

1. The Subject Line:

Your
 subject line must be formatted exactly as: [Your First Name] | Senior Ops Partner | [Your Favorite Park City Season]

2. The First Sentence:

In the very first sentence of your cover letter, please state the current snow depth or temperature at Park City Mountain Resort. Detail your relevant experience in the remainder of the letter.

3. The Workflow Test:

In your cover letter, explicitly list the three specific AI tools you would use to turn a raw 10-minute Loom video from me into a polished blog post and three LinkedIn snippets. Briefly explain your logic.

4. The Calendar Context:

Briefly describe a project where you successfully built, followed, or managed a marketing calendar/content schedule in a previous role.

5. The Proof (Creative):

Include 3–5 samples of your previous work (social media posts, short-form videos, graphic designs, or blogs created for real estate campaigns). You must include at least one example showing how you used AI as a starting point and meaningfully built on it.

6. The Proof (Analytical):

Include an example of a report or metrics tracker you have previously conducted to show your engagement performance tracking experience.

title: Senior social media designer & content creator ????
description:
We're looking for a senior social media designer & content creator ????



Hi! I'm Mieke, founder of Hummingbirds — a digital marketing agency based in Belgium. We manage the social media and branding for a diverse portfolio of clients, and we're looking for a talented creative to join us on a freelance basis.



What makes this role different



This is not just a content creation role. We're looking for someone who truly understands branding — and knows how to translate a brand's identity into a consistent, high-quality social media presence. Every post, every visual, every piece of content should feel like it belongs to the brand. That level of attention and craft is what we're after.



What we're looking for



- You have a strong sense of branding and visual identity — you don't just make things look nice, you make them look right

- You're able to pick up a brand's style and carry it through consistently across social media content

- Your design work is premium, polished and high-end

- You have proven experience creating social media content that performs — both visually and strategically

- You're a self-starter who takes ownership and delivers without hand-holding



What the work looks like



You'll be creating social media content for our clients — primarily visual design with a strong branding focus. This is a freelance collaboration, starting with a first project, with the potential for ongoing work across multiple clients.



The level we're aiming for



To give you a clear idea of the quality and style we have in mind, here are some inspiration examples:















Each client has their own unique branding. Your job is to respect that branding 100% — every single visual should feel like a natural extension of that brand. No compromises, no shortcuts. Premium, always.



How to apply



Interested? Please send us your portfolio so we can get a feel for your style and level of work. We're specifically looking to see your social media design work — show us what you're most proud of.

Mieke De Weerdt

title: Operations Coordinator – Solar & Roofing
description:
Operations Coordinator – Solar & Roofing

Location: Remote but working on Brisbane business hours







About Us



We are a fast-growing solar and roofing company delivering high-quality installations across Brisbane Australia. Unlike many companies, we control our installs, value customer experience, and focus on doing things right the first time.



As we scale, we’re looking for an Operations Coordinator to become the central hub of our business — ensuring every job flows smoothly from sale through to installation and payment.







About the Role



This role is the heartbeat of our operations.



You’ll manage the customer journey from signed contract to completed install, coordinating schedules, handling customer communication, and ensuring all job documentation and payments are completed.



If you love organization, customer service, and keeping moving parts aligned — this role is for you.







Key Responsibilities



 Job & Client Management



 • Create and maintain client files in CRM



 • Manage job documentation and compliance paperwork



 • Track job progress from sale ? install ? payment



Customer Communication



 • Answer customer calls and
s



 • Provide updates on scheduling and install timelines



 • Manage expectations and resolve basic issues



Scheduling & Coordination



 • Book installations and coordinate crews



 • Schedule site visits if required



 • Liaise with installers and suppliers



Work Orders & Admin



 • Process work orders



 • Ensure all job details are accurate before install



 • Coordinate permits and approvals (if applicable)



 Invoicing & Payment Follow-up



 • Ensure invoices are sent



 • Follow up outstanding payments



 • Support finance/bookkeeping team with job costing info







What We’re Looking For



Essential



Strong organisation & attention to detail



Confident on the phone with customers



Experience scheduling jobs or coordinating teams



Ability to manage multiple jobs at once



Tech-savvy (CRM systems, Google Workspace, job management software)



Highly Regarded



Experience in solar, roofing, construction, or trades



 Experience with job management software (e.g. ServiceM8)



Understanding of install workflows







Personality Fit



You are:



 • Calm under pressure



 • Proactive and solution-focused



 • Great with customers



 • Highly organised



 • A natural problem solver







Why Join Us?



Fast-growing company with long-term opportunities



Work closely with leadership and influence operations



 Be part of a team that values quality and customer experience



Flexible work options (if applicable)



Competitive salary for the right person



Please send me a Message and apply with the word APPLE in the first sentence so I know you pay attention to details.



Also outline how your previous experience relates directly to what we are doing!

title: AI-Powered Copywriter & Creative Strategist (Claude + Gemini Expert)
description:
We are a fast-growing DTC (direct-to-consumer) brand where copy is everything.



We’re looking for a high-level creative strategist + copywriter who deeply understands human psychology, direct response, and knows how to leverage AI tools (Claude + Gemini Deep Research) to produce winning angles, hooks, and full-funnel copy.



This is NOT a basic writing role.

You will be responsible for driving creative direction and performance through copy.



What You’ll Be Doing

- Use Gemini Deep Research to extract insights, market trends, and customer psychology

- Use Claude to develop:

- High-converting ad copy (Meta)

- Landing pages & product pages

- Hooks, angles, and creative concepts

- Turn research into clear messaging frameworks

- Continuously test and iterate copy based on performance

- Work closely with the founder to shape brand voice and positioning



Who You Are:

You are NOT just a writer. You are a thinker and strategist.



You:

- Understand direct response marketing deeply

- Know how to write copy that converts, not just sounds good

- Are fluent in using AI tools to 10x output and quality

- Can turn messy ideas into clear, persuasive messaging



Must-Have Skills

- Strong experience with Claude (prompting + copywriting workflows)

- Experience using Gemini / AI research tools

-Deep understanding of: Customer psychology, Awareness levels, Angles & hooks



Proven experience writing for:

- DTC brands

- E-commerce / ads / landing pages



Big Bonus If You’ve Read / Studied:

- Breakthrough Advertising – Eugene Schwartz

- Claude Hopkins (Scientific Advertising)

- Gary Halbert

- Modern DTC copy frameworks

(If you haven’t studied these, this role is probably not for you.)

title: Executive Assistant with >5 years experience
description:
Role Overview

We are seeking a highly organized, tech-savvy, and detail-oriented Executive Assistant to support a global founder and investor. This is a dual-focus role: you will manage a complex professional calendar and investment-related administration while simultaneously acting as a luxury travel curator and lifestyle manager.



The ideal candidate thrives in a fast-paced, international environment and has a "zero-fail" mentality regarding scheduling and logistics.



Key Responsibilities

1. Bespoke Travel & Experience Design



End-to-End Planning: Research, plan, and book high-end international trips (adventure, luxury, and cultural immersion).



Bespoke Itineraries: Create detailed "high-quality" travel decks or Notion pages including restaurant reservations, local transport, and "off-the-beaten-path" experiences.



Logistics Management: Handle visa requirements, flight bookings (Emirates/Star Alliance), and hotel coordination (Marriott Bonvoy/Boutique).



2. Calendar & Workflow Management



Gatekeeping: Manage a complex, multi-timezone calendar, prioritizing high-value business meetings and investment calls.



Process Optimization: Maintain and build Notion databases to track investments, real estate portfolios, and project statuses.



In-Box Triage: Monitor communications to ensure urgent matters are surfaced and routine tasks are handled autonomously.



3. Project & Lifestyle Support



Data Management: Create and maintain Notion tables for lifestyle optimization (e.g., longevity protocols, workout schedules, or collection management).



Research: Conduct deep-dive research into new business ventures, "good-for-you" consumer products, or real estate opportunities.



Personal Admin: Coordinate with private chefs, household staff, or local service providers across multiple residences (UAE, Europe, US).



Requirements

Experience: 5+ years as an EA for professional individuals or founders.



Excel and/or Notion Advanced User: Ability to build relational databases, formulas, and aesthetically clean dashboards.



Travel Expertise: Deep knowledge of luxury travel landscapes and the ability to find "elevated" dining and hospitality experiences.



Communication: Fluent, high-level English (written and verbal). Ability to draft professional correspondence and interact with high-level stakeholders.



Mindset: Proactive, autonomous, and comfortable with ambiguity. You don't just find problems; you bring three solutions.



Technical Stack

Workspace: Google Workspace (Gmail, Calendar, Drive). Microsoft (Outlook). 



Organization: Notion (Advanced level).



Communication: WhatsApp.



Compensation & Benefits

Competitive monthly retainer (experience-dependent). $900-$1100 for full-time. $500-$600 for part-time. 



Flexible, 100% remote working environment.



Opportunity to work within a high-growth investment and entrepreneurial ecosystem.



How to Apply:

We want to ensure that all applicants have a fair and equal chance, so we’re using a TestGorilla assessment (
). This minimizes unconscious bias in our hiring process. Successful candidates will be invited to a job interview.



Ready to join our team? Start by clicking the link below.

title: Video Editor — AI-Powered Ad Creative (E-Commerce)
description:
ABOUT US

Korvanis is a direct-to-consumer health & wellness e-commerce brand selling therapeutic home devices in Czech Republic and Slovakia. We help people with chronic back pain through innovative products advertised on Meta 
/Instagram).



THE ROLE

We're looking for a full-time video editor to create high-converting video ads from AI-generated assets. You are NOT shooting footage — you're combining AI-generated clips, voiceovers and images into polished ad creatives.



WHAT YOU'LL DO EVERY DAY

- Edit 2-3 polished VSL-style video ads per day (2-5 minutes each) with AI voiceover, subtitles, transitions, and sound effects

- Add clean, synced subtitles/captions to all videos

- Handle sound design: music selection, SFX layering, audio leveling, pacing

- Follow creative briefs with competitor reference videos and scripts provided in English

- Translation to Czech/Slovak is handled by AI tools — no language skills needed



TOOLS WE PROVIDE (No Cost to You)

- Claude AI (scripting, translation, creative support)

- ElevenLabs (AI voiceover)

- Kie.ai API (AI image/video generation)

- CapCut Pro

- Heygen (AI avatar/video)

- Full creative briefs with competitor references



REQUIREMENTS

- Strong video editing skills (CapCut, Premiere Pro, DaVinci Resolve, or similar)

- Sound design experience: music, SFX, audio leveling, pacing

- Clean subtitle/caption creation synced to voiceover

- Comfortable working with AI-generated assets (we train you on our workflow)

- Eye for direct-response ad pacing — you understand the first 3 seconds matter most

- Hardware: minimum 16GB RAM, stable internet, CapCut desktop capable

- Self-motivated, async worker — deliverables due by 6:00 PM CET daily



NICE TO HAVE

- Experience editing ads for Meta/TikTok/YouTube

- Familiarity with AI video tools (Kling, Runway, Pika, Heygen)

- Understanding of direct-response marketing (hooks, CTAs, urgency)

- Health/wellness or e-commerce experience



COMPENSATION

- $400/month paid biweekly ($200 every 2 weeks)

- Performance bonus: $40-50 per winning ad ($1,000+ spend over 14 days with 2.5+ ROAS)

- Top editors realistically earn 2-4 bonuses/month on top of base

- 3-day paid trial period



HOW WE WORK

- Fully asynchronous communication

- You receive: script in English + competitor reference + creative direction

- You deliver, we give feedback, you iterate

- Quick calls when both online, no fixed meeting schedule



HOW TO APPLY — READ CAREFULLY

Applications missing any of these will NOT be reviewed:



1. Your portfolio or showreel — 3 to 5 of your best edited videos (ads preferred)

2. A short Loom or video message (1-2 min) introducing yourself, your experience, and your editing setup

3. Answer this question in your message: "What makes the first 3 seconds of a video ad effective?"



Top candidates will receive a short PAID test: edit a 2-3 minutes video

? Proven experience building production voice AI agents (not tutorials, not demos)

? Evidence of work: active phone number from a past client, backend system walkthrough, case study, or similar

? Experience with voice/telephony platforms (11Labs, Retell AI, Twilio, etc.)

? Understanding of LLMs and prompt engineering

? Experience with n8n or similar automation platforms

? Ability to integrate with CRM/booking systems (Calendly, HubSpot, Airtable, etc.)

? Reliable communication and organised workflow



WHAT WE'LL ASK IN YOUR APPLICATION

Before applying, be prepared to answer:



Your Voice AI Experience: Walk us through a production system you built. What was the business problem? What tools did you use? What were the results?



Your Evidence: Provide one of the following:



An active phone number from a past client's business (we'll call it to test)

A backend system walkthrough (Loom video or call) showing your architecture

A detailed case study with metrics

Links to deployed systems you've built



Your Building Process: 



- How do you approach building a new voice AI system? Walk us through your workflow from requirements to deployment.



- Testing & Quality Assurance: How do you test voice agents? What does your QA process look like? How do you catch edge cases?



- Your Tech Stack: What LLMs do you use? (Claude, GPT-4, etc.) What voice platforms? What do you use for automation and integration? Why those choices?



- Communication & Organisation: How do you communicate progress? What tools do you use to stay organised? How do you handle revisions and feedback?



- Your Experience: Years building voice AI? What types of businesses have you worked with? What's the most complex system you've built?





WHY THIS MATTERS

We work with real businesses: plumbers, HVAC contractors, med spas, roofing companies. Their customers are calling expecting a real experience. We need someone who:



- Ships production-quality code

- Tests thoroughly

- Thinks about edge cases and user experience

- Communicates clearly and promptly

- Can scale with us



WHAT'S NEXT?



If you have solid production experience and real evidence of work, apply with:



- A brief intro

- Answers to the 7 questions above

- Your evidence (link, phone number, or Loom video)



We'll review applications and start conversations with people who meet the requirements.

title: Remaker – Graphic Designer & Proofing & Print Specialist
description:
About the Role

We are seeking a highly detail-oriented and technically skilled Remaker to support our promotional and customizable product operations. The ideal candidate will be responsible for recreating, correcting, and adjusting artwork files to ensure they meet all technical printing requirements before final approval and production.

This role is essential in maintaining production accuracy and preventing costly errors. The Remaker acts as a critical link between the design, sales, and production teams, ensuring every file is production-ready, technically compliant, and visually consistent with the client’s brand.



Key Responsibilities

Recreate and modify artwork files according to client requests and internal specifications

Correct artwork errors related to layout, alignment, scale, color mode, bleed, and resolution

Ensure all files meet strict printing and production standards before finalization

Work extensively with product templates across various customizable merchandise

Maintain brand consistency and visual accuracy in all remade files

Review and verify technical specifications to prevent production delays or reprints

Manage multiple remake requests simultaneously while meeting tight deadlines

Collaborate closely with proofing, design, sales, and production teams to streamline workflow



Work Schedule

6 working days per week

1 rest day (Saturday or Sunday CDT)

24/7 operation

Fixed 8-hour shifts

Schedule may vary based on operational needs



Requirements

Strong knowledge of graphic design principles and print production workflows

Advanced proficiency in Adobe Illustrator and Adobe Photoshop

Proven experience working with product templates and detailed technical specifications

Exceptional attention to detail and accuracy

Ability to work efficiently in a fast-paced, high-volume environment

Strong time management skills and ability to meet demanding deadlines

Clear and professional communication skills



Nice to Have (Optional)

Familiarity with specific printing processes (e.g., screen printing, digital printing, embroidery, heat transfer)

Experience in promotional products or customizable merchandise industry

title: Airbnb Claims Manager
description:
Role Overview

We are hiring an experienced Airbnb Claims Manager to handle all post checkout claims across our portfolio. You must have previous experience working in Airbnb Support and understand how to navigate claims, documentation requirements and review removal processes from the inside. Your role will focus on filing accurate claims, progressing them with support, and actioning review removals where eligible. The hours will be Monday - Saturday, 11am - 6pm.



Key Responsibilities

1. File all Airbnb Resolution Centre claims for damages, missing items, excess cleaning and breaches

2. Work directly with Airbnb Support using your platform experience to move claims to resolution

3. Prepare and upload evidence including photos, invoices, reports and message logs

4. Track all claims, maintain organised documentation and update internal records

5. Identify and action reviews eligible for removal based on Airbnb’s policy

6. Communicate professionally with guests when follow up is required

7. Flag any high risk cases or escalations to the management team

8. Coordinate with operations to quickly gather required evidence or details

9. Responds to all support cases throughout all platforms during your shift and dispute refunds if necessary



Requirements

1. Must have previously worked for Airbnb Support handling claims or trust and safety matters

2. Strong written English with clear and confident communication

3. High attention to detail and an organised approach to evidence and documentation

4. Ability to work independently and follow structured processes

5. Reliable internet and ability to work Australian hours

If you can make AI footage that doesn't look like AI footage, this role is for you.



Here is the page: 
 



What You'll Be Doing:



Producing 3 x 45–90 second AI videos daily using Higgsfield

Working from 3 static character reference images and 3 new scripts (provided by us each day)

Submitting completed videos for review and incorporating feedback quickly



What We're Looking For

Required:

Strong eye for realism — you spot what looks "off" and fix it before submitting

Ability to maintain character consistency across high-volume daily production

Reliable, async communicator who hits deadlines without chasing

Ability edit the final video in capcut with retention edits and zooms



Preferred:

Familiarity with higgsfield or ai character / video generation (kling, nano banano etc)

Background in video editing



The Details:



3 videos per day, every day

Length 60–90 seconds per video

Rate $3–$5 per video

Direct with founder 

Communication via WhatsApp (we're based in Thailand - ICT timezone)



BONUS: EACH VIDEO THAT GETS OVER 100K VIEWS GETS $10 BONUS



Non-Negotiables:



You must submit real Higgsfield or other ai video generation outputs with your application — no portfolio, no consideration

English only

No ghosting. Reliable communication is mandatory

You must be ready to start immediately

Before any ongoing work, you'll complete one paid trial video using our character images and a provided script. We'll assess realism, consistency, and turnaround before moving forward.



How to Apply:

–3 Higgsfield or AI video examples you've personally produced



- A short explanation walking through your production process

This is a long-term role with growing volume. If you're the right person, there's a clear path to higher rates and expanded scope as the channel scales.

mbers based in the Philippines and are looking to add a Sixth for a long-term position.

Why Join Us?

READ BELOW!!!!! MUST READ!!!

title: Expert Video Editor - Davinci
description:
** PLEASE READ ALL THE INSTRUCTIONS & ONLY APPLY IF YOU HAVE EXTENSIVE VIDEO EDITING EXPERIENCE**



Are you a talented video editor with a passion for creating captivating, fast-paced social media videos? I’m looking for a skilled professional to finalize high-quality 1-2 minute videos for my social media platforms.



About the Role



I need a highly dependable, truly exceptional video editor who can learn to replicate my video editing style. This role involves quick turn around times and large amounts of footage. I need someone passionate about storytelling and who has a great eye for selecting the best 
nts out of hundreds (sometimes thousands) of clips and arranging them in a way that goes along with a voiceover in the most compelling and powerful way possible.



You'll be assisting my team of video editors by stepping in during the second half of the video creation process, working with raw, already chopped footage, voiceovers, and initial edits I’ve prepared to produce videos ready for another tea
mber to color grade. Each project will involve 20 minutes to 2 hours of pre-chopped footage, which you’ll sift through to select the best clips and create a 1–2 1/2 minute video that tells a compelling story.



Our team includes a part time video color-grader and captioner so most likely you will not be color grading or captioning the final videos. You will be our expert clip arranger who can arrange the footage according to my voiceover in a compelling way, using only the very best pieces of footage available.



This is a per project roll that pays $35 USD a video, with 3-7 videos a week. Our video output fluctuates, so some weeks there may be more work available for you if you'd like it.



My ideal video editor must be confident that they can create videos in my signature style:



Example 1: 

Example 2: 

Example 3: 





Key Responsibilities



- Edit and arrange video clips to align with pre-recorded voiceovers.



- Review and narrow down footage to select the most compelling clips.



- Craft engaging and visually appealing videos that flow naturally and tell a cohesive story.



- Incorporate relevant visuals such as screen recordings, maps, and on-screen text when necessary.



- Ensure videos feature dynamic intros/hooks to capture viewers' attention and match with video intros I've created in the past.



- Collaborate via DaVinci for seamless project sharing and updates.





What I’m Looking For



- Proven Expertise: Advanced video editing skills with a portfolio of engaging short-form content.



- Proficiency in DaVinci



- Attention to Detail: Ability to identify and highlight the best 
nts in raw footage.



- Storytelling Skills: Strong sense of pacing and narrative structure.



- Social Media Savvy: Familiarity with the style and trends of platforms like TikTok and Instagram.



- An editor who can create videos in my signature style.





- What I Provide



- Raw footage and voiceovers for each project.



- Clear direction and collaboration throughout the editing process.



- Flexibility to foster creativity and innovation in the editing process.





How to Apply:



1. Change the subject line to how many years experience you have editing videos



2. (IMPORTANT) Provide links to 3-5 specific videos you've edited that showcase your abilities to create videos like my example videos. Please do not give any examples of talking-head style videos.



3. Please send your portfolio



4. Answer the following questions:



- Kindly illustrate how the linked videos you've provided demonstrate your suitability for the role and why you would excel in editing travel and vlog videos.



- What software do you use to edit videos? And are you willing to use Davinci for an easier collaboration process?



- Do you have any other experience that will make you a perfect fit for the job?



- Do you feel confident that you can edit 3-5 high quality videos each week, for $35 USD a video?



- Are you open to doing a paid test task?



Thank you for your time, and I look forward to chatting with you!

title: Operations & Growth Coordinator — US Performance Marketing Agency
description:
ABOUT US



We’re a boutique performance marketing agency based in the US. We manage paid media (Meta Ads, Google Ads) for DTC ecommerce brands and private equity portfolio companies in the $5M–$250M revenue range. Our team has managed over $600M in total ad spend.

We are a small, senior team not a big agency with layers of junior people. Everyone here is excellent at what they do. We’re looking for one exceptional person to become the operational backbone of the firm and grow with us long-term.



THE ROLE



This is a hybrid role. You’ll be part operations manager, part executive assistant, part SDR (sales development rep), and part project coordinator. You won’t specialize in just one thing you’ll own the daily engine that keeps the entire business running.

If you’re the kind of person who thrives on having 10 different responsibilities, loves checking things off, and gets satisfaction from making sure nothing falls through the cracks this role was designed for you.

You’ll work directly with the founder. There’s no middle management layer between us.



WHAT A TYPICAL DAY LOOKS LIKE



Morning (EST overlap hours):

Check HubSpot CRM: update deal stages from yesterday’s activity, flag any deals going stale, note which prospects need follow-up today

Pull daily performance data from reporting dashboards (Northbeam, Google Sheets) and update client-facing templates

Review Monday.com boards: check freelancer delivery status, update task statuses, flag anything overdue

Send daily Slack summary to the team: what’s due, what’s done, what needs attention



Midday:

Outbound prospecting: research 5–10 new prospects using our ICP criteria, enrich their data, add to HubSpot with notes

Draft follow-up
s for warm leads and stale deals founder reviews and sends from Gmail

Process meeting transcripts: extract action items, create tasks in Monday.com, send follow-up summaries

Coordinate with freelancers: check on creative deliverables, confirm timelines, relay feedback



Afternoon:

Content: draft LinkedIn posts, social media updates, or
 copy for our brand using AI tools to assist, then you polish and queue

Light web updates: make edits to our company landing pages (WordPress or basic HTML/CSS), update case studies, keep the website current

Invoicing, payment tracking, calendar management, and other admin as needed

End-of-day Slack update: what you completed, what’s blocked, what’s planned for tomorrow



REQUIRED SKILLS & EXPERIENCE

2+ years working remotely for a US-based company you understand US business hours, communication norms, and async work culture

HubSpot CRM experience deal pipelines, contact management, saved views, activity logging. This is your primary tool.

Advanced Google Sheets IMPORTRANGE, pivot tables, data cleanup, building summary dashboards from raw data

Monday.com or similar PM tool board management, automations, status tracking across multiple projects and team members

Strong written English you’ll draft outreach
s, LinkedIn content, client-facing summaries, and internal reports. Grammar, tone, and professionalism matter.

Outbound/SDR experience you’ve done prospect research, list building, lead enrichment, and/or cold
 drafting before. You know what a good outreach message looks like.

Proactive and self-directed you don’t wait to be told what to do. You check the queue, you flag problems, you send the EOD update without being asked. This is the single most important trait.



BONUS POINTS (NOT REQUIRED, BUT WILL SET YOU APART)

Experience at a digital marketing agency, media buying shop, or ecommerce company

Familiarity with Northbeam, Triple Whale, GA4, or similar analytics/attribution platforms

Apollo.io, Store Leads, LinkedIn Sales Navigator, or similar prospecting tools

Understanding of DTC ecommerce metrics: ROAS, CPA, MER, CAC, AOV, LTV you don’t optimize them, but you know what they mean

n8n, Zapier, or Make.com automation experience

Basic WordPress or HTML/CSS (enough to update landing pages, not build from scratch)

Shopify admin familiarity (product edits, order lookup)

Comfort using AI tools (ChatGPT, Claude) as a daily work accelerator we’re an AI-forward team



TOOLS YOU’LL USE

HubSpot CRM  •  Monday.com  •  Google Workspace (Sheets, Docs, Gmail)  •  Slack  •  Northbeam  •  Granola (meeting transcripts)  •  Claude AI  •  Loom  •  WordPress  •  Shopify (occasionally)



COMPENSATION & DETAILS

Salary: $800–$1,000/month depending on experience. Negotiable for exceptional candidates.

Schedule: Full-time, 40 hours/week. Must overlap with US Eastern Time mornings: 8AM–12PM EST minimum (8PM–5AM Manila time). Remaining hours are flexible.

13th month bonus paid in December.

Quarterly performance bonuses ($100–$200) tied to pipeline accuracy, reporting timeliness, and outbound activity.

Annual salary increases for strong performers.

Long-term position. We are building a team, not filling a temp slot. We want someone who stays for years.



HOW TO APPLY



In your message, answer these four questions:



Tell me about your most recent remote role. What company, what did you do day-to-day, and why did you leave (or why are you looking)?

What’s your HubSpot experience? Be specific which features have you used, how many contacts/deals were you managing, what did your CRM workflow look like?

Have you done any outbound prospecting or SDR work? Describe the process: what tools, how you found leads, what your outreach looked like, what results you got.

Describe a time you caught a problem before anyone else noticed. What was it, how did you find it, and what did you do?



Applications that don’t answer all four questions or use a generic cover letter will not be reviewed.

We respond to every qualified applicant within 48 hours.

title: Remote Ophthalmologist
description:
Remote Ophthalmologist to complete charts. Job Title: Remote Optometrist



Job Summary:

We are seeking a dedicated and licensed Remote Ophthalmologist to provide virtual eye care services to patients across various locations. The role involves performing comprehensive eye exams, diagnosing vision problems, and offering advice on eyewear, contact lenses, and general eye health—all through telemedicine.



Key Responsibilities:



Conduct Virtual Eye Exams: Use telemedicine platforms to assess patients' eye health, gather medical history, and perform vision tests.



Diagnose and Treat Eye Conditions: Identify common vision issues such as nearsightedness, farsightedness, astigmatism, and presbyopia, and provide solutions.



Prescribe Eyewear & Contact Lenses: Based on exam results, issue prescriptions for glasses or contact lenses.



Monitor Patient Progress: Follow up with patients, track their vision health, and adjust prescriptions when necessary.



Provide Advice on Eye Care: Offer guidance on maintaining eye health, managing digital eye strain, and preventing common eye diseases.



Patient Education: Educate patients on how to use their prescribed eyewear properly, the importance of regular eye exams, and how to take care of their vision.



Document Patient Information: Keep accurate records of consultations, prescriptions, and any recommendations made for future care.



Collaborate with Other Healthcare Providers: Work closely with general healthcare providers and ophthalmologists when necessary for complex cases.



Required Qualifications:



MD degree from an accredited Medical school.



State license to practice as an Ophthalmologist (for U.S.-based positions; other country licenses may be required depending on location).



Proven experience in providing eye exams and diagnosing visual impairments.



Comfortable with using telemedicine platforms for virtual consultations.



Excellent communication skills, with the ability to explain eye care concepts clearly and concisely.



Proficient in using optical diagnostic tools (e.g., autorefractor, slit lamp, etc.), even in a remote setting.



Preferred Qualifications:



Experience with remote or telehealth services.



Knowledge of eye health trends and the latest in virtual care technologies.



Familiarity with prescribing digital solutions for common eye strain or other digital-related visual issues.



Work Environment:



This is a remote position, so candidates must have access to high-speed internet and a quiet, professional workspace.



Must be available for consultations during business hours or as required.



Benefits:



Competitive salary with performance-based bonuses.



Flexible working hours.



Continuing education and training in telemedicine and remote eye care.

title: Virtual Assistant -  Appointment Setter
description:
We're a growing social media and lead generation agency looking for a sharp, driven Virtual Assistant to handle appointment setting. You'll be the first point of contact for warm leads - starting conversations, qualifying prospects, and booking calls for our sales team.



This is a remote, commission-heavy role with real earning potential for someone who's consistent and coachable.



What You'll Do

You'll engage prospects across messaging platforms,
, and follow-up sequences. You'll qualify leads based on our criteria and get them booked on the calendar. You'll keep our CRM and KPI tracker updated with clean, accurate records. You'll hit daily and weekly booking targets, and work closely with team leads to sharpen scripts and improve conversion rates.



What We're Looking For

We need someone with excellent English - written and spoken, near-native level. You should be a strong communicator who's organized, detail-oriented, and shows up consistently. A reliable internet connection and a proper home office setup are a must, and you need to be available during U.S. business hours.



Compensation - Earn Up to $1,750/Month

Base pay is $250/month, paid out $125 bi-weekly. On top of that, you earn $50 for every deal that closes. Hit milestones and you unlock bonuses: $100 at 5 closes, $200 at 10, $300 at 15, and $500 at 20. So at 5 closed deals you're at $600/month, at 10 you're at $950, at 15 you're at $1,300, and at 20 you're pulling in $1,750.



Payment is via Wise or PayPal.



Why This Role

You get to work from home, earn in USD, and be part of a team that actually invests in your growth. High performers get long-term opportunities. We're not looking for a temp, we're looking for someone who wants to build something with us.



How to Apply

Send us a short intro about yourself, your relevant experience, and why you'd be a strong fit. To show you read the full post, drop your favorite color in the first line of your application.



If you're self-motivated, hungry to learn, and ready to earn, we want to hear from you.

title: Full-time Bilingual Intake Specialist / Closer
description:
We are a fast-growing US based law firm looking for a full-time bilingual (English/Spanish) intake specialist who knows how to follow up and close.

You will be speaking with people who have already reached out to us. Your job is to build trust, stay in touch, and help them hire us.



What You’ll Be Doing

Answer inbound calls from potential clients

Call and text leads who have already contacted us

Follow up multiple times until you get a response

Explain our services clearly and confidently

Send invoices and help guide clients to payment

Keep detailed notes in our system

Work closely with our team to move cases forward

What Makes This Role Different



Most intake roles stop after one or two follow-ups.



We don’t.



If someone reaches out to us, we believe they deserve a real chance to hire us.



That means:



consistent follow-up

thoughtful communication

not letting leads fall through the cracks



We are persistent—but always respectful.



Who This Is For



You are someone who:



Is fluent in English and Spanish

Is comfortable being on the phone most of the day

Is not afraid to follow up multiple times

Understands that most people don’t answer the first time

Can be warm and kind while still guiding the conversation

Likes helping people make decisions

Who This Is NOT For



This is not a good fit if you:



Only want to answer inbound calls

Feel uncomfortable following up more than once or twice

Prefer
 over phone conversations

Avoid asking for the sale

What Success Looks Like

Leads are contacted quickly

No lead is forgotten

Clients feel taken care of

More people choose to hire our firm

Compensation

Base: $1,000 – $1,200/month (based on experience)

Performance bonus available 



High performers can earn $2,000+/month



Our Culture



We are “nice people who help nice people.”



That means:



We treat clients with respect

We treat each other with respect

We do good work and take pride in it



We are not aggressive on the phone but we are consistent and professional.



How to Apply



Please include all of the following:



A resume/CV

A short voice note (in English and Spanish) introducing yourself

A brief description of your experience with phone-based work or sales

Your availability and internet setup

Your answer to this question:

     How many times should you follow up with a lead who has not responded, and why?
