title: Interior Design Photographer
description:
Looking for a photo editor to help me grow my interior design/ lighting design photography business. I mainly work as a lighting designer and I photograph my own projects and a selection of other projects from my network (also lighting design projects) 



Therefore I need help with the editing process so I can focus on shooting. 



I mainly use lightroom and sometimes photoshop for more complex lighting editing/removal of objects 



The typical workflow is as follows: 



- Culling

- Stacking and creating HDR (I use 3 bracketed shots)

- Fixing up the geometry (key, needs to be done ‘manually’ with the guides rather than with the ‘auto’ alignments in lightroom since it never gets it right’

- Basic correction  : White Balance, Exposure, Contrast, etc

- Color Cast Removal: keep Neutral White walls while maintaining the warm Glow of the lights.

- Other corrections sometimes needed: cromatic aberration. Somethings i need to do this manually to avoid green/purple lights

- Deletion of unwanted objects/elements: building services (speakers, sprinklers, emergency and exit lights including the green cast of the emergency lights), signage, labels, etc. Unwanted people (when not intentionally on the photo)

- Creation of photoproofs in lightroom- very easy task with my template

- Exports in both hi-res and low-res JPEGS

- 



- I’ll send you 8 photos (RAW files) for you to edit following the workflow described above. (Merging 3 exposures, creating HDR, colour correction, etc)

- You will deliver 8 ready high res JPEGs

-Estimated time for this task is 1 hour 



I am looking for a long-term partner for 2-3 shoots per month (40-80 photos each). While the initial test is for $2 hours, I am looking for a consistent workflow and am happy to discuss per-project rates as our volume grows.

title: Video & Photo Editor (High-End Architecture & Lighting Design)
description:
Overview: I am a professional architectural photographer (The H Design Studio) specializing in high-end lighting design and commercial interiors. I am looking for a long-term creative partner to handle two specific tasks:

Video Editing: Transforming professional 4K footage/stills into sophisticated, rhythmic Instagram Reels.

Photo Geometry: Performing precise perspective corrections and object removal in Lightroom Classic.



My work is about the interplay of light and clean geometry. I need an editor who understands "editorial" pacing—minimalist, clean, and high-end.



The Workflow (Crucial):



Software: You must be proficient in Adobe Premiere Pro and Lightroom Classic.



The Sync: We will use a Lightroom Catalog workflow. I will send you a "Smart Preview" catalog; you will fix the geometry and perform cleanups (removing exit signs, sensors, etc.), and send the catalog back for me to color grade.

Frequency: 1 high-quality Reel per week + geometry/cleanup for ~10–15 stills per project.

Aesthetic: Think "Architectural Digest" or "High-End Design Firm," NOT "Generic Real Estate/Influencer."



The Application (Required): Please provide a portfolio or 2–3 specific examples of your work. I am specifically looking for:

Sophisticated Typography: Minimalist fonts with intentional tracking/spacing.

Rhythmic Transitions: No "flashy" or "cheap" transitions. Cuts must snap perfectly to the beat of the music.

Geometry Precision: An eye for perfectly vertical lines and clean architectural "Uprights."



The Test (Paid): I will select top candidates for a paid trial. I will provide a Lightroom Smart Preview catalog for 3 images and assets for a 15-second Reel.

Task: Fix geometry/cleanup on 3 photos + edit 1 Reel.

Rate: Please state your hourly rate in USD.



How to Apply:

Link your portfolio (Architecture/Design focus preferred).

Confirm you are comfortable with the Lightroom Catalog/Smart Preview workflow.

Briefly explain your approach to "syncing to a beat."

Confirm your availability for a weekly 2–4 hour commitment.

title: Video Editor
description:
Video Editor

Media Production & AI Technology  |  Full-Time  |  Remote

OnlineJobs.ph  |  Philippines-Based





ABOUT THE COMPANY

This role supports two US-based companies under shared leadership.

Upscale Media LLC is a premiu
dia company producing cinematic wedding films through Bordeaux Weddings, sorority recruitment and event media through Sorority Nation, and ongoing creative partnerships for non-profit organizations, brands, and mission-driven clients. The work spans wedding cinema, event coverage, campaign content, social media assets, and recurring media partnerships — all held to a premium editorial standard.

Angry Digital Inc. is a US-based AI technology company building Nexeo.ai — an AI Search Intelligence platform that helps digital agencies track, measure, and optimize how their clients appear in AI-powered search results (ChatGPT, Google AI Overviews, Perplexity, and more). We’re a fast-moving founding team backed by real revenue from our e-commerce portfolio and owned media properties. This is a ground-floor opportunity at a company building category-defining software.

Your workload will be split across both entities: premium cinematic, event, and brand content for Upscale Media, and podcast, promotional, and product content for Angry Digital.





THE ROLE

You’ll be the primary editing engine across both companies. On the Upscale Media side, that means cinematic wedding films, sorority recruitment videos, event recaps, and social clips. On the Angry Digital side, you’ll edit podcast episodes, cut promotional clips, and produce brand content. You’re not building creative strategy from scratch — you’re receiving raw footage, references, and creative direction, then delivering polished, on-brand edits with speed and consistency. You’ll work directly with the COO and production team, follow established SOPs, and own your turnaround deadlines.





CORE RESPONSIBILITIES

Edit cinematic wedding highlight films, ceremony edits, and feature-length wedding films for Bordeaux Weddings

Edit sorority recruitment films, bid day recaps, philanthropy videos, and event content for Sorority Nation

Edit podcast episodes and produce short-form clip packages for the Angry Digital Podcast

Cut short-form social clips (15–60 seconds) from long-form content for Instagram, TikTok, and LinkedIn

Produce brand and product content for Angry Digital Inc. and Nexeo.ai as needed

Sync and manage multi-cam and multi-audio source footage, including external recorders and drone footage

Color grade and color correct footage to match brand-specific looks and client expectations

Follow established editing SOPs, naming conventions, and project file structures

Manage assets through cloud-based review and delivery platforms (
, Dropbox, Replay)

Execute revisions within defined revision windows — typically two rounds per deliverable

Maintain consistent turnaround timelines and communicate proactively on delivery status

Organize and archive raw footage, project files, and final exports with proper folder structure

Create motion graphics, lower thirds, and title cards as needed for branded content





REQUIRED SKILLS & EXPERIENCE

2+ years of professional video editing experience with a strong portfolio of completed work

Proficiency in Adobe Premiere Pro — this is the primary editing platform across all brands

Solid understanding of color grading workflows (Lumetri, DaVinci Resolve, or equivalent)

Experience editing wedding films, event content, or cinematic short-form projects

Ability to sync multi-source audio and manage multi-cam timelines cleanly

Strong sense of pacing, storytelling, and emotional tone — especially for cinematic and narrative-driven edits

Comfortable working with large file volumes including 4K footage and Blackmagic RAW (BRAW)

Detail-oriented with the ability to follow brand guidelines, SOPs, and revision checklists without dropping quality

Reliable high-speed internet and a capable editing workstation (you supply your own hardware)

Clear communication skills in English — written updates, revision notes, and delivery confirmations

Willingness to work with some US ET overlap (minimum 3–4 hours daily)





BONUS SKILLS (NOT REQUIRED)

Experience with DaVinci Resolve as a secondary editing or grading tool

Motion graphics capability in After Effects (lower thirds, title sequences, transitions)

Drone footage editing experience

Familiarity with cloud review platforms like 
 or Replay

Podcast or long-form audio editing experience (Descript, Audition, or similar)

Experience with AI-assisted editing tools (e.g., Autopod, Descript, Opus Clip) for workflow acceleration

Basic sound design and audio mixing skills beyond simple dialogue sync

Experience editing content for sorority, Greek life, or event-driven organizations





COMPENSATION & DETAILS

Salary:  $450–600/month depending on experience

Type: Full-time (40 hours/week)

Schedule: Monday–Friday, flexible with minimum 3–4 hour US ET overlap

Location: 100% Remote (Philippines-based)

Benefits: 13th-month pay, performance bonuses, compensation growth tied to output quality and reliability, clear path to Senior Editor or Post-Production Lead as we scale





HOW TO APPLY

Send your resume, a link to your editing reel or portfolio (3–5 pieces showing range across cinematic, event, and/or short-form work), and a short Loom video (under 3 minutes) walking through one editing project from import to export — show us your timeline, your process, and how you organize your workflow. We want to see how you think, not just what you deliver. Bonus points if your Loom shows your actual screen and tools, not just a talking head.

Applications without a portfolio/reel and a Loom video will not be reviewed.

title: Senior Video Editor (US-Based Brand / PST Schedule)
description:
About Veritas Vans

Veritas Vans builds the most trusted accessories for Starlink Mini and Starlink Standard. Our mission is to give people the freedom to work, explore, and stay connected anywhere. From Baja coastlines to deep forest trails, our customers rely on our gear for capability, protection, and unlimited connection.



Your role is to help visually tell this story across all platforms.



Role Overview

We are hiring a Senior Video Editor who can own our long-form YouTube content, high-retention short-form content, and graphic design needs. You must be highly experienced, creative, fast, and able to work autonomously within a growing brand.



Responsibilities



Video Editing – Long Form

- Edit 6–15 minute YouTube videos with strong retention, pacing, and narrative clarity.

- Add b-roll, overlays, captions, music, and brand-consistent graphics.

- Build engaging openings with proven YouTube hook methods.



Video Editing – Short Form

- Execute the Hook ? Retain ? Reward method for Reels, TikTok, and Shorts.

- Add dynamic subtitles, zooms, cuts, 
 inserts, and pacing adjustments.

- Produce scroll-stopping, high-retention content.



Graphic Design & Photo Editing

- Create YouTube thumbnails and graphic assets.

- Design text treatments, overlays, and promotional visuals.

- Edit lifestyle and product photos for multi-platform use.



Brand Storytelling

- Align all edits with our brand themes: freedom, connection, capability, control.

- Contribute creative ideas and concepts for future video content.



AI-Driven Editing & Workflow Optimization

- Use AI tools (ChatGPT, Adobe AI, Topaz, Descript, etc.) as a core part of your editing workflow.

- Generate high-performing hooks, captions, and on-screen text callouts using AI.

- Use AI to research and improve storytelling, pacing, and content structure.

- Continuously explore and implement new AI workflows to improve output quality, speed, and efficiency.

- Leverage AI to enhance both creative output and production throughput, not just assist basic tasks.



Cross-Platform Optimization

- Edit in multiple aspect ratios: 16:9, 9:16, 4:5, 1:1.

- Prepare final deliverables in organized, structured folders.

- Optimize content for YouTube, Instagram, TikTok,
.



Collaboration

- Work closely with the content team and leadership.

- Follow SOPs and meet deadlines consistently.

- Join scheduled calls proactively (no reminders required)

- Be punctual and prepared for feedback sessions



Work Discipline & Delivery Standards

- Be actively available and responsive during working hours (PST schedule).

- Address tasks, revisions, and team communication within working hours.

- Meet deadlines consistently and communicate early if delays occur.

- Submit deliverables early in the workday whenever possible to allow time for review and revisions.



Quality & Output Standards

- Deliver edits that are near publish-ready on first submission.

- Ensure drafts require minimal revisions and are not incomplete or partially executed.

- Perform a full self-review before submission to ensure:

- all feedback is applied

- no new issues are introduced

- output meets brand and quality standards

- Maintain consistently high production quality across all deliverables.



Note:

Include the phrase “Senior Video Editor Pro” in your subject line. Applications missing this phrase will not be considered. Use at least 5AP for your application.



Required Skills



- Ability to work graveyard shift (PST hours)

- Proven experience editing YouTube content and high-performing short-form videos

- Experience creating high-converting thumbnails

- Strong understanding of modern content trends across YouTube, Instagram, and TikTok

- Ability to edit lifestyle, outdoor, product, and UGC-style content



AI & Workflow Skills (Required)

- Strong proficiency in using AI tools (ChatGPT, Adobe AI, etc.) within editing workflows

- Ability to generate hooks, captions, and on-screen text using AI

- Experience using AI to improve storytelling, pacing, and video performance

- Ability to research and implement new AI workflows to improve efficiency and output quality



Work Ethic & Discipline

Bonus Experience

title: Bookkeeper & Accountant (Australia-Based Expertise Required)

title: Guest Support for a Short Term Rental
description:
ROLE OVERVIEW

We are seeking a Guest Support & Operations Analyst to manage overnight guest communications and support key backend operations. This role combines guest relations, reservation management, and administrative tasks to ensure seamless service and operational accuracy.



IMPORTANT NOTE ABOUT THIS ROLE

- This is NOT a generic support role.

- You’ll be juggling guests, cleaners, and maintenance teams in real time — often with imperfect information and real consequences if poor decisions are made. Because of that, our hiring process is intentionally more challenging than a typical “message responder” position.

- The assessment you’re about to take is designed to understand how you think — how you prioritize, communicate, and make judgment calls when there isn’t one obvious right answer.

- If you enjoy solving realistic scenarios, thinking critically, and taking ownership, you will likely enjoy both this assessment and the job itself. If you are looking for a simple, scripted support role, this probably won’t be the right fit — and that’s okay.



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

Guest Communications & Support

- Respond promptly and professionally to booking inquiries, guest messages, and support requests across multiple platforms.

- Provide phone support to address urgent guest needs and ensure timely issue resolution.

- Collaborate with the operations team to facilitate smooth check-ins, check-outs, and overall guest satisfaction.



Operational & Administrative Support

- Perform booking cleanup, ensuring reservations are accurate and conflicts are resolved.

- Conduct guest cleanup by maintaining accurate records and organizing guest profiles.

- Manage listing accuracy and resolve platform-related issues across Airbnb, 
, Expedia, etc.

- Support accounting functions, including expense tracking, invoice updates, and discrepancy reporting.

- Assist in lead management, including organizing, qualifying, and supporting follow-up efforts for potential property acquisition opportunities.



Qualifications

- Experience with short-term rental platforms (Airbnb, 
, Vrbo, etc.).

- Strong communication skills and professional phone etiquette.

- Detail-oriented with strong organizational abilities.

-Tech-savvy and able to work independently during overnight shifts.

- PREFERRED: Experience with PriceLabs, Beds24, accounting tasks, or lead management.



HOW TO APPLY

Upload your resume here >>> 
/s/5sal0p7n

title: Full-Stack Developer Needed for Spec-Driven AI ESL Web App (Milestone-Based MVP)
description:
Full-Stack Developer Needed for Spec-Driven AI ESL Web App (Milestone-Based MVP)



I am an ESL (English as a Second Language) instructor building a simple, focused web application for teachers.



The goal of the app is to allow teachers to paste any text and instantly generate structured lesson materials.



This is an MVP (minimum viable product). The design, layout, and behavior are already fully defined and must be followed exactly. This is a spec-driven build, not a design project.



I am looking for a developer who can execute cleanly, follow detailed specifications, and build the project in milestones.



?



What You Will Build



A web app with:

 • Two-panel layout (desktop)

 • Left: text input and generated output

 • Right: lesson settings

 • Core features

 • Paste text input

 • Select lesson options (checkboxes with quantity inputs)

 • Generate content using OpenAI (ChatGPT API)

 • Toggle between “Original” and “Leveled” content (no page reload)

 • Regenerate output

 • View previous version

 • Download DOCX file (clean, formatted)

 • Mobile responsiveness

 • Desktop: two-pane layout

 • Mobile: stacked vertical layout

 • Stripe integration

 • Stripe should be integrated during the MVP build

 • It will not be active at launch

 • It should be set up so payment/subscription features can be turned on later without a major rebuild



?



Technical Requirements

 • Frontend: React (preferred) or similar modern framework

 • Backend: Node.js (or similar)

 • AI Integration: OpenAI API (ChatGPT)

 • File Export: DOCX generation

 • Payment Integration: Stripe (inactive at launch, ready for later activation)



?



Important Notes

 • Full Balsamiq layout will be provided

 • Full functional specification (UI + behavior) will be provided

 • Full UI color specification will be provided

 • Inspiration images for visual direction will be provided

 • You must follow the provided structure and behavior exactly

 • Do not redesign the interface



?



Validation and Fixer Layer (Important)



The system must include both a validation layer and a fixer layer.



Validation Layer



AI-generated output must be automatically checked before being shown to the user.



The validator should detect issues such as:

 • missing or blank answers

 • incorrect or incomplete answer keys

 • malformed question sets

 • formatting inconsistencies

 • broken structure in generated output



Fixer Layer



If issues are detected, the system should automatically correct them before the user sees the result.



This may include:

 • automatically regenerating the full output

 • regenerating only the broken section

 • correcting formatting issues

 • ensuring the final output is clean and usable



This entire process must be:

 • seamless

 • automatic

 • invisible to the user



The goal is for the teacher to receive output that is reliable, classroom-ready, and does not require extra fixing.



?



Milestones (Important)



This project will be completed in phases. Not all features will be built at once.



Milestone 1 – Core UI Build

 • Build the frontend interface exactly according to the provided spec

 • Implement two-panel layout

 • Implement scrollable panel behavior

 • Implement fixed bottom action area

 • Ensure responsive layout (desktop and mobile)



Milestone 2 – Core Generation Workflow

 • Integrate OpenAI (ChatGPT API)

 • Generate output based on user input and selected settings

 • Implement toggle between “Original” and “Leveled”

 • Implement regenerate and previous version behavior



Milestone 3 – DOCX Export + Validation/Fixer Layer

 • Implement clean DOCX export

 • Implement validation layer

 • Implement fixer layer

 • Ensure output is usable and consistently formatted



Milestone 4 – Stripe Setup

 • Integrate Stripe in inactive mode

 • Prepare payment/subscription system for later activation

 • No live payments at launch



Each milestone will be reviewed and approved before moving to the next.



?



What I’m Looking For

 • Strong attention to detail

 • Ability to follow specifications precisely

 • Experience building clean, simple web apps

 • Experience working with OpenAI API

 • Experience with Stripe integration

 • Good communication

 • Comfortable working in milestone-based phases



?



Budget

 • Target: $1,000–$2,000 total for MVP

 • Payment will be milestone-based



?



To Apply



Please include:

 1. Examples of similar web apps you’ve built

 2. Your experience with OpenAI API

 3. Your experience with Stripe integration

 4. A short message confirming you understand this is a spec-driven, milestone-based build

 5. Briefly explain how you would approach the validator + fixer layer



?



Bonus Question



Please answer this in your application:



How would you implement a fixed action bar with a scrollable settings panel?

title: Quality Control Assistant for Real Estate Media
description:
Part-Time Quality Control Assistant for Real Estate Media Company



We are looking for a sharp, detail-oriented Quality Control Assistant to be the final layer between our editing team and our clients. Your role is to make sure every gallery is clean, organized, polished, and ready for delivery.



About Us

We are not just looking for a Virtual Assistant to fill a role - we are looking for a long-term tea
mber.



We are a cutting-edge real estate media company providing photo, video, and virtual tours for real estate clients. Over the past 3+ years, we’ve completed 2,000+ projects and are looking to take the company to the next level through strategic growth.

- Honest and accountable

- Fast, but careful

- Strong communicator

- Strong English

- Willing to learn and grow

description:
Job Title: Salesforce Tester or Salesforce QA Engineer or Salesforce Test Automation Engineer or CRM Platform Tester  or Salesforce Manual Tester (Automation Growth Role) or Salesforce QA Tester or Salesforce QA Analyst or Salesforce Test Analyst  



Location: Philippines / Remote 



Working Hours: Part-time, Permanent, Fully flexible anytime 



About Application House 



Application House is a Salesforce consulting agency that operates three different business models consulting, product development and support. 



 



We are truly reflecting the name House of the Application. We are developing a very advanced Application/Product that includes an Artificial Intelligence App including LLM hosted services, products like Uber, GCash, Grab, SMS/WhatsApp Messaging App, Fundraising & Payment App, etc. 



Are you excited to join a brilliant, intelligent team? Then why wait? Go ahead and apply the role. 



Role Overview 



We are seeking an experienced QA Tester to support the quality and reliability of our Salesforce solutions. This role will focus on establishing and overseeing robust testing strategies across the platform, ensuring all releases meet high-quality standards. You will work closely with developers, SCRUM Masters, and the release manager to implement test automation, manage test cycles, and drive continuous improvement within the QA function. 



 



You have the opportunity to learn using AI tools like Claude code and ChatGPT Codex to generate test script, test automation. We are an Artificial Intelligence (AI) company. 



 

The tester will ensure end-to-end regression coverage for Lightning components, LWC-based UIs, and Salesforce UI, supporting CI/CD quality gates on the Salesforce platform. 



 



This role involves working closely with developers, admins, and product managers to ensure that every release meets Application House’s high standards for reliability, performance, and user experience. 



 



This role is ideal for a Manual Tester who wants to transition into Automation Testing using modern tools like UTAM, Selenium, Apex testing, and AI-assisted test generation. 



 



Key Responsibilities 



Review business and technical requirements to design comprehensive test plans and test cases. 



Perform functional, regression, integration, and end-to-end testing on Salesforce applications. 



Execute manual and automated test cases across multiple Salesforce environments. 



Document defects clearly and track them through resolution using tools like Jira or Azure DevOps. 



Perform manual exploratory testing to identify edge cases and usability issues 



Execute UAT support and business validation testing 



Validate data accuracy using SOQL queries and Salesforce reports 



Test user permissions, roles, and sharing rules 



Perform integration testing with external systems (QuickBooks, Stripe, Twilio APIs, etc.) 



Test AppExchange package installation, upgrades, and uninstall scenarios 



Validate mobile responsiveness and Salesforce Mobile App behaviour 



Willing to learn automated UI tests using UTAM, Selenium, and other supported Salesforce automation frameworks. 



Develop and maintain end-to-end regression suites for Salesforce managed packages (Lightning Web Components, Apex Controllers, Triggers, Flows). 



Build data-driven test scripts for multiple Salesforce org environments (sandbox, UAT, production). 



Integrate test execution within CI/CD pipelines (GitHub Actions / Bitbucket / Jenkins). 



Collaborate with developers to identify automation candidates during sprint planning. 



Maintain automation codebase, modular test models, and reusable components. 



Log, track, and verify defects in Jira, working with developers for resolution. 



Support cross-browser and device testing (Chrome, Edge, Firefox). 



Ensure positive/negative test coverage for Lightning Record Pages and Salesforce UI. 



Prepare test documentation: automation scripts, test data setup, test reports, and coverage metrics. 



Contribute to manual-to-automation transition, reducing regression testing effort. 



Stay current with Salesforce test automation tools, particularly UTAM, Provar, and Salesforce Testing Frameworks. 



 



Required Skills & Experience 



2–3 years of experience in software testing, including Salesforce testing. 



2+ years of experience as a QA Tester with a focus on Salesforce platform (Sales Cloud, Service Cloud, etc.). 



Experience writing clear and structured manual test cases 



Understanding of test case design techniques (boundary value, equivalence partitioning, etc.) 



Experience performing regression and exploratory testing 



Basic knowledge of API testing (Postman or similar tools) 



Strong knowledge of Salesforce features, workflows, validation rules, and security model. 



Experience with test management tools. 



Solid understanding of software testing lifecycle and QA methodologies. 



Good if you have but not essential Hands-on with UTAM, Selenium, WebDriverIO, or Provar. 



Good understanding of Salesforce data model, custom objects, triggers, flows, and Lightning pages. 



Understanding or willingness to learn JavaScript or Java for automation scripting. 



Familiarity with CI/CD and version control tools (Git, Jenkins, Bitbucket). 



Proficient in using Test Management tools (Jira, TestRail). 



Excellent analytical, debugging, and problem-solving skills. 



Ability to work collaboratively in Agile/Scrum environments. 



Own test strategy, governance & quality metrics 



Hands-on Salesforce testing (Lightning, LWC, integrations, APIs) 



Integrate tests into CI/CD (GitHub) 



Mentor QA engineers and lead distributed teams 



 



Preferred Qualifications 



Salesforce Certified Administrator or Platform App Builder (advantageous). 



Experience testing Salesforce projects. 



Knowledge of Salesforce DX, Scratch Orgs, and Packaging Automation. 



Familiarity with Salesforce UTAM Page Object Model and JSON-based configuration. 



Understanding of Salesforce Lightning Design System (SLDS) and UI selectors. 



 



Nice to Have (Automation Exposure) 



Exposure to UTAM, Selenium, Playwright, or similar automation tools 



Basic understanding of Apex test classes 



Experience working with CI/CD pipelines 



Exposure to Git version control 



 



Tools & Technologies  



Postman (API testing) 



Browser DevTools (debugging) 



Salesforce Developer Console / Workbench 



TestRail or Zephyr 



 



Why Join Application House 



Work on real Salesforce AppExchange products used by global customers. 



Exposure to Salesforce UTAM-based automation — one of the newest automation standards in the Salesforce ecosystem. 



Collaborative global team (UK, India, Philippines) with continuous learning opportunities. 



Competitive salary, flexible work hours, and performance bonuses. 



Opportunity to grow into QA Lead or Salesforce Test Automation Architect roles.

title: VA Virtual Assistant
description:
Seeking Virtual Assistant. Must have writing/blogging skills, social media skills, and video editing. 



1. Writing / Blogging

2. Social Media Skills  (You must share your FB, Instagram, YT, and
 ).  Otherwise. OJT rate will apply. 

3. Video Editing Skills



These 3 skills must be demonstrated.  



1. Share your blogs and posts on social media and LinkedIn.

2. Show proof of your social media skills. 

3. Show proof of your video editing skills. 



The rate must match the examples you provided. High rate means you are an expert blogger with 100s of blogs to share. If you don't have examples, please share a humble rate that is fair. 



This is a trial GIG.   This means we have to see a sample of your 1-2 hour blogs, 1-2 hour social media skills, and 1-2 hour video editing. We will baseline the initial work. For example, if you bill 2 hours for a blog and 2 hours for social media posting along with 2 hours of video editing. We now have 6 hours of work. Our goal is to see kong sulit ang 6 hours na trabaho.  After a successful gig, we can continue the discussion until something long term can be formulated.
salary: $2 to $5 per hour or word count.

title: Chief Operating Officer (COO) E-commerce Beauty Brand
description:
Faccelove is a fast-growing e-commerce beauty brand serving thousands of customers worldwide every day. Our mission is to help people preserve and enhance their natural beauty through innovative products and meaningful brand experiences.



This role is only for someone who has proven, measurable results in previous companies, thrives on taking ownership, and excels at building strong teams and systems. Since you need to have an extraordinary amount of attention to detail, please start your application with the word "leader".



What You’ll Be Responsible For (Core Responsibilities):



As COO, you are the operational backbone of the company. You work directly between the founders and the team, ensuring a strong, efficient, and scalable operation.



Store Operations:



Oversee and optimize daily store operations

Monitor fulfillment, supplier relations, inventory, and performance

Identify bottlenecks early and proactively solve them on your own

Content Operations:



Structure and streamline all content workflows

Manage planning, deadlines, and team accountability

Ensure consistent, high-quality, on-time content delivery

Internal Systems & Processes:



Build SOPs, workflows, and automation systems

Implement tools to improve efficiency across departments

Create scalable systems that run like a well-oiled machine

Team Leadership & Accountability:



Lead daily/weekly calls and manage cross-functional teams

Communicate clearly and deliver actionable next steps

Coach teams, maintain accountability, and drive performance

What We Are Looking For (Skills & Experience):



We need someone who does not need to be trained from scratch, someone who brings real experience and combines it with hunger, ownership, and strong leadership.



Requirements:



Minimum 3 years experience in a high-performance e-commerce or agency setting

Strong leadership and team management skills

Excellent communication: clear, decisive, solution-oriented

Experience building SOPs, systems, and organizational structures

Proven ability to manage multiple departments at once

Thrives in fast-paced environments with many moving parts

Full-time availability (40+ hours) with flexibility on weekends in CET (Amsterdam)



What You Can Expect:



Salary depending on experience 

Long-term working relationship with a global D2C brand

A key leadership role directly under the founders

Room for initiative, innovation, and strategic input

A high-performance culture with clarity, speed, and high standards

Monthly review meetings + weekly operational check-ins

Work with a driven team aiming for rapid growth and operational excellence



What’s in it for you?



Competitive salary

On-time and reliable payments

Opportunity to work with a fast-growing global e-commerce brand

Long-term growth opportunities



Please fill out this form to apply: 
==

title: Truck Dispatcher (Freight Dispatch Experience Required)
description:
We are seeking a dispatcher with at least 2 years of experience in planning, logistics, operations, or a related field.



Responsibilities include:

 • Searching and booking loads

 • Communicating with brokers and drivers

 • Organizing and optimizing routes to meet weekly targets

 • Reviewing and completing rate confirmations (broker packets)

 • Tracking loads and ensuring on-time pickups and deliveries



English proficiency is required. Spanish is not mandatory but would be a plus, as many drivers are more comfortable in Spanish.



Strong communication and negotiation skills are essential, along with basic Excel knowledge.



This position is based in Chicago, USA, and candidates must be able to work from 7:00 AM to 4:00 PM Central Time (CST).



In our collaborative environment, you will play a key role in ensuring weekly operational success.

title: Short Term Rental Interior Design Assistant
description:
Job Overview:

Wambold Properties is seeking a detail-oriented and creative STR (Short-Term Rental) Design Assistant to support our growing portfolio of vacation rental properties. This role focuses on assisting with interior design planning, sourcing furnishings, and ensuring each property delivers a high-quality guest experience aligned with our brand standards.



Key Responsibilities:



Assist in creating design concepts and mood boards for short-term rental properties

Research and source furniture, décor, and accessories within budget guidelines

Coordinate product selection, pricing, and ordering details

Organize and maintain design documents, spreadsheets, and project trackers

Collaborate with the design and operations team to ensure cohesive execution

Support staging plans and provide input on layout and functionality

Stay updated on STR design trends, guest preferences, and market standards

Assist in quality checks to ensure properties meet brand and guest-ready standards



Requirements:



Experience or strong interest in interior design, home styling, or STR setups

Proficiency in tools such as Canva, Google Sheets, and basic design software (e.g., SketchUp, Photoshop is a plus)

Strong organizational and time management skills

Excellent attention to detail

Ability to work independently and communicate effectively in a remote setting

Experience with online sourcing platforms (Amazon, Wayfair, etc.) is a plus



Preferred Qualifications:



Background in interior design, architecture, or a related field

Experience working with Airbnb or short-term rental properties

Familiarity with budgeting and procurement processes



Work Schedule & Compensation:



Part-time or full-time (to be discussed)

Remote work setup

Competitive compensation based on experience



About Wambold Properties:

Wambold Properties specializes in developing and managing high-performing short-term rental spaces designed to maximize guest satisfaction and property returns. Our focus is on thoughtful design, efficient operations, and creating memorable guest experiences.



How to Apply:

Submit your resume, portfolio (if available), and a brief introduction highlighting your relevant experience and interest in STR design.

title: Credit repair disputer
description:
The ideal candidate:



• Has strong knowledge of FCRA, FDCPA, and CFPB standards

• Understands factual-based disputing and compliance-driven methods

• Can review full credit reports and identify reporting inaccuracies

• Has experience with bureau disputes, direct-to-creditor disputes, and debt validation

• Understands Metro 2 reporting standards

• Tracks investigation timelines and maintains organized documentation

• Operates with honesty — no shortcuts or misleading tactics



We strictly follow legal and ethical disputing practices. No template spam, no false claims, and no disputing accurate information without legal basis.



We are looking for someone who takes pride in their work, values integrity, and wants to grow long-term with a structured and purpose-driven company.

title: A+ Social Media Manager
description:
Salon Marketing Solutions is an Australian-based marketing education company supporting beauty salons, skin clinics, and aesthetic businesses across Australia and New Zealand. We provide done-for-you campaigns, strategic mentoring, and practical tools to help clinic owners grow consistently and confidently.



Please ONLY apply if you have experience in the ff:
 Marketing, Meta Ads, Canva Pro, Meta Business Suite



Recruited and Trained by Vanessa McDonald Consulting – Installed™ Service

Installed™ builds in-house marketing capability for beauty and skin clinics.

This role is a 4–6 week training and placement pathway, preparing you to run the full social media marketing function inside a clinic — not as an agency, but as an embedded tea
mber.



Purpose:



To lead and execute a clinic’s social media marketing strategy, design, content, engagement, and paid ads — with the goal of growing visibility, followers, and lead lists. You will be placed with a growing clinic business (to be advised at the second interview) and work directly with the clinic owner following installation.

 marketing will be required on an ad-hoc basis to complement social strategy.

This is an incredible opportunity to learn directly from Vanessa McDonald — one of Australia’s most respected marketing strategists in the professional beauty and skincare industry, with 24 years of experience guiding clinics to build sustainable, high-performing marketing systems.



You’ll be trained in:



The beauty, skin, and aesthetics industry — treatments, terminology, and client psychology.

The specific clinic’s business, brand, and product range.

 marketing systems used within the industry, including Phorest or Shortcuts (training provided for these only if the clinic you are placed with uses these particular platforms).



Core Responsibilities:



- Develop and implement Instagram and
 strategies that drive engagement, growth, and qualified new client leads.

- Manage Meta Ads end-to-end: strategy, creative, setup, optimisation, and reporting.

- Confidently operate within the Meta Business Suite and Ads Manager, keeping up to date with current Meta tools and best practices.

- Design high-quality, on-brand content in Canva Pro, following the clinic’s brand style guide.

- Create and edit reels and short-form videos using apps such as CapCut or similar.

- Write fluent, polished UK English captions and campaign copy that reflect the clinic’s tone of voice.

- Manage DMs and engagement daily — responding to enquiries, nurturing prospective clients, and connecting with local influencers and aligned businesses for collaboration opportunities.

- Build and send
 campaigns using Mailchimp or the clinic’s in-house marketing system (Mailchimp expertise is essential).

- Utilise AI tools to enhance efficiency while preserving human judgment and creative quality.

- Prepare concise monthly reports covering organic performance, ads, and
 activity.

- Once Installed, you’ll work directly with the clinic owner using a clear communication and project management system that sets expectations, deadlines, and approvals.



Required Experience & Skills



- Minimum 3 years’ proven experience in social media strategy and Meta Ads management.

- Demonstrated results in organic audience growth and engagement.

- Strong proficiency with Meta Business Suite, Ads Manager, data analysis, and reporting.

- Advanced Canva Pro design capability with excellent attention to detail. We’re seeking candidates who can create clean, professional artwork and design aligned to brand standards.

- Confident in photo editing and basic retouching to ensure all visual content is polished, consistent, and on-brand.

- Skilled in reel creation and short-form video editing (CapCut preferred).

- Expert in Mailchimp, including automation, segmentation, and reporting.

- Adaptable to other industry platforms such as Phorest or Shortcuts (training provided for these systems only).

- Familiar with ManyChat or similar tools for automated lead capture.

- Excellent written and spoken UK English for an Australian audience (10/10 fluency).

- Reliable, responsive, and professional in remote settings.

- Must successfully complete a test task before onboarding.



Work Structure & Conditions

Part-time: 20 hours per week (remote, flexible)

Training rate: $175 AUD/week (6-8 weeks)

Probation (3 months): $200 AUD/week

After 12 months: $240 AUD/week

12months +: 280AUD per week

Performance bonuses apply for meeting or exceeding campaign KPIs and results benchmarks.

If you prefer full-time work, you may be placed with two clinics instead of one.

All recruitment, training, and placement are managed through Vanessa McDonald Consulting – Installed™.



Only applicants who will fill out the form below will be screened:

title: SENIOR SEO LEAD
description:
Role Overview



We are hiring an SEO Team Lead to own and grow our SEO department.



This is not just a technical role.



You will:



Lead SEO strategy across multiple clients



Manage and mentor SEO specialists and content writers



Build scalable SEO systems and processes



Connect SEO performance to real business outcomes



Work closely with the founder and leadership team



You must think strategically and execute consistently.



Key Responsibilities

1. Strategy & Planning



Develop 6–12 month SEO roadmaps



Create cluster and topical authority strategies



Build local SEO strategies for service-based businesses



Align SEO with revenue and lead targets



2. Team Leadership



Manage and mentor SEO specialists



Oversee content writers and editors



Review and improve briefs before execution



Run internal SEO meetings



Improve team processes and documentation



You will be responsible for performance and quality.



3. Technical SEO Oversight



Site architecture



Internal linking strategies



Schema implementation



Core Web Vitals



Indexation and crawl management



Redirect and migration planning



GBP optimization and local signals



4. Data & Reporting



Use GA4 and Search Console daily



Track conversions and attribution



Translate SEO metrics into business impact



Identify performance drops and growth opportunities



Present results confidently to clients



5. Process & Systems



Build repeatable SEO SOPs



Implement sprint-based SEO workflows



Use AI tools to improve efficiency



Improve reporting systems





Maintain task accountability through ClickUp or similar tools



Requirements

Experience



4+ years in SEO



Experience leading or mentoring a team



Proven local SEO results



Experience with service-based or local businesses



Agency Experience is a must



Skills



Strong technical SEO knowledge



Ability to create scalable content systems



Clear communication skills



Comfortable leading client calls



Strong analytical mindset



Familiar with AI tools and automation



Work Structure



Remote position



Must overlap at least 3–5 hours with Canada West Coast business hours



Ability to attend strategy calls during PST time zone when required



What We Are Looking For



We want someone who:



Thinks like a business owner



Cares about measurable impact



Takes ownership without being micromanaged



Can challenge weak strategy respectfully



Is calm under pressure



Wants to build something long-term



This is a leadership position, not a junior SEO role.



What You Will Gain



Direct impact on a growing agency



Leadership authority in the SEO department



Freedom to build systems



Opportunity to scale with the company



Competitive compensation based on experience and performance



How to Apply



Please include:



A short introduction about your SEO philosophy



One example of a 6-month SEO roadmap you created



A sample content brief



A description of a technical SEO issue you solved



Your time zone and availability overlap with PST

title: Stable online ESL jobs available for both full-time and part-time, with flexible working hours.

Working Hours

Working Days: 6 days per week

Teaching Hours: 5 ~ 80 hours weekly

Available Schedule: 7:00 AM - 22:00 PM

Minimum Teaching Requirement during Peak Hours: 5 hours



Job Requirements

title: We sincerely invite long-term cooperation as we have a consistent, large-scale demand for Filipino online ESL teachers.
description:
We are an educational institution with over ten years of industry experience and a large stable student base. As our business continues to expand, we have launched a new online English tutoring platform. We are now recruiting a large number of qualified online English teachers from the Philippines.

We sincerely extend a cooperation invitation to headhunters and agencies with high-quality, stable and large-scale teacher resources. We welcome partnership discussions to achieve resource complementarity and long-term win-win cooperation.



Recruitment Requirements

1.Able to steadily supply Filipino teachers in bulk, flexibly adjust the number of candidates according to our needs, and support long-term continuous cooperation.

2.All provided Filipino teachers must have fluent oral English proficiency and hold official teaching certifications such as TESOL or TEFL .

3.Teachers are required to have one-on-one English teaching experience (online teaching experience is preferred). They should be skilled in one-on-one teaching for kids and children, with excellent classroom interaction and communication abilities.

4.Cooperate with us in arranging trial lessons and qualification verification to ensure authentic personal information and qualified teaching capabilities.



Our Cooperation Advantages

1.Stable & High Demand: We own a large student group with consistent booking needs throughout morning, afternoon and evening peak hours.

2.Efficient Cooperation Process: Dedicated communication channel and exclusive staff for screening and follow-up. Transparent review procedures greatly improve cooperation efficiency.

3.Guaranteed Commission Payment: Commission is settled per successfully onboarded teacher, paid every two weeks with no payment delays.

4.Long-term In-depth Collaboration: Exclusive partnership will be established for outstanding partners with high-quality resources and efficient services, with priority access to all our recruitment demands.



Requirements for Partners

1.Individual recruiters or formal agencies with direct access to Filipino teacher resources, no multi-level intermediaries, ensuring stable supply and reasonable cost.

2.Capable of preliminary screening, including qualification checks and oral assessments, to provide pre-qualified candidates and reduce communication costs for both sides.

3.Cooperate with trial lesson assessments, pre-service training arrangements, and daily coordination such as schedule adjustments and basic issue feedback.

4.Uphold integrity in cooperation. Ensure all teacher information and certifications are authentic; no fake credentials or inexperienced teachers shall be recommended. All cooperation terms must be strictly followed.

5.Conduct internal screening to exclude teachers with poor work attitude and inactive communication habits.

6.Serious inquiries only.



Cooperation Scope & Services

1.Partners provide bulk resumes and basic information of Filipino teachers that meet our standards in terms of quantity, teaching experience and course adaptability.

2.After we complete resume screening and online interviews to confirm employment, partners assist with follow-up onboarding coordination.

3.Partners maintain daily basic communication with teachers to ensure smooth teaching operations.

4.Both sides conduct regular reviews to adjust teacher supply quantity and optimize cooperation procedures according to business development.



Cooperation Process

1.Demand Communication: Partners contact us and introduce their resource scale, teacher qualifications and supply capacity; both parties confirm detailed cooperation terms and models.

2.Resource Verification: Partners send sample teacher profiles for our qualification review and trial lessons to verify overall resource quality.

3.Trial Cooperation: Start small-scale trial cooperation to run in workflows. After confirming teaching quality and service performance, formal long-term bulk recruitment cooperation will be launched with commission settlement executed as agreed.



Note

Interested partners please attach a brief introduction of your Filipino teacher resources (scale, certification proportion, supply capacity, etc.) when contacting us for quick review and follow-up arrangement.

title: YouTube & Social Media Assistant (Boxing Content)
description:
I'm looking for a part-time Virtual Assistant to support an established boxing channel (Instagram and Tik Tok) for primarily YouTube (BoxingSense) focused on long-term development, education and structured training. The focus at this stage is to use the content to direct like-minded people into an online community hosted on Skool.



This role is focused on execution, time-saving with potential input on creative direction for YouTube based on Skool or YouTube progress. You will assist with content packaging, editing support and platform management while following clear guidelines.



Core Responsibilities

- Editing videos and clips into long-form format such as for YouTube and the ability to repurpose long-form YouTube content into short-form clips (Reels / Shorts)

- Add simple hooks and structure to long-form videos (based on provided guidance)

- Improve YouTube thumbnails (clean, clear messaging and with the goal to eventually develop the brand)

- Assist with refining video topics based on YouTube SEO

- Upload and optimise YouTube videos (titles, descriptions, tags, chapters)



Bonus (Not Required)

- Interest in boxing or combat sports

- Experience working with educational or coaching content

- Understanding of short-form content pacing



Expectations

- Prefers structure over creativity

- Can follow systems and improve over time

- Maintain a clean, minimal, non-hype style

- Prioritise clarity over flashy edits

- Communicates clearly and meet deadlines

- Reliable and consistent

- Open to feedback and revisions



Tools / Software (Preferred)

- CapCut / Premiere Pro (or similar editing software) I have been using CapCut to edit the thumbnails and making videos

- Canva or Capcut (for thumbnails)

- YouTube Studio

- Google Drive (file organisation)



This is a long-term role with room to grow as the channel develops.



Application Instructions

Please include the word knockout in your subject line or first sentence so we know you’ve read the full job post.  



In your application, please answer the following:

1. If given a 5-minute boxing training video, how would you select 2–3 clips for short-form content?

2. What makes a short boxing video compelling enough for someone to want to learn more or join a coaching group?

3. How would you balance keeping content simple and structured while still making it engaging?

Please also include:



Links to samples of your edited Reels or Shorts

Examples of content that performed well (e.g. strong views, engagement, or growth)

Any proof of managing or improving social media accounts (if available)
salary: - $5 AUD per hour - Potential increase b

title: Podcast VA
description:
Are you a skilled and detail-focused Podcast Post-Production VA who enjoys creating polished audio content? We’re looking for a reliable professional to manage the editing and post-production process for a pre-recorded podcast.



This role starts at approximately 20 hours per week and may grow into a full-time opportunity over time. We’re looking for someone who takes pride in producing high-quality work, communicates well, and is interested in building a long-term working relationship.



Because all episodes are pre-recorded, this role offers flexible working hours, allowing you to complete your editing on a schedule that works for you as long as deadlines are met.



Main Responsibilities

• Podcast Production: Edit and finalize one podcast episode per week (typically 45–60 minutes) so it is fully polished and ready for publishing.

• Promotional Clips: Create two short clips from each episode for social media promotion—one before release and one after the episode goes live.

• File Organization: Keep all raw files and final outputs properly organized within shared cloud storage such as Google Drive.



Required Skills

• Audio Editing Skills

Experience editing multi-track audio (multiple speakers, music, and sound levels) using common editing tools such as Audacity or similar software. Candidates should have their own editing software.

• File Management & Organization

Strong ability to organize files within cloud platforms such as Google Drive, Dropbox, or OneDrive. Attention to detail is essential.

• Communication & Collaboration

Ability to understand feedback, communicate clearly, and implement revisions when needed.

• Adaptability

Comfortable making adjustments to edits when required. Revision rounds may occur occasionally, but tight turnaround deadlines are not expected.



Bonus Skills

Experience with multi-camera video editing is a plus, especially as the podcast may expand into video formats in the future.

title: Audit Associate - NFP
description:
Audit Associate – Serve Churches & Ministries Using Your Accounting Skills (Remote, Philippines-Based)



Join a Faith-Driven Team Making a Kingdom Impact



At Dennison CPA, PC, we are passionate about using our accounting expertise to serve God’s Kingdom. We partner with churches and Christian ministries across the United States, helping them remain faithful stewards of the resources God has entrusted to them.



We are a team of committed Christians who love the Lord and seek to use our professional skills to serve His Church. If you’re looking for work that has both professional growth and eternal significance, we invite you to apply.



About the Role



As an Audit Associate, you will support U.S.-based churches and nonprofit organizations by assisting in audits, reviews, and compilations. You will work closely with U.S. CPAs and senior tea
mbers to deliver high-quality financial reporting and ensure compliance with nonprofit accounting standards.



This is a full-time, long-term remote position for candidates based in the Philippines who are willing to work U.S. business hours (night shift).  Flexibility is available but must overlap with US Central Time Zone 4-5 hours per day.



Key Responsibilities

•	Assist in audits, reviews, and compilations for nonprofit and church clients 

•	Prepare working papers, audit schedules, and supporting documentation 

•	Analyze financial data to ensure accuracy and compliance 

•	Collaborate with senior auditors and managers on engagements 

•	Communicate professionally with U.S.-based clients via
, chat, and video calls 

•	Apply knowledge of U.S. GAAP and nonprofit accounting standards (FASB) 

•	Assist in preparing audit reports and client deliverables 

•	Continuously improve technical and professional skills through training and mentorship 



Qualifications



Required

•	Bachelor’s degree in Accounting, Finance, or related field 

•	1–3 years of experience in auditing or accounting 

•	Basic understanding of financial statements and accounting principles 

•	Strong proficiency in Microsoft Excel and Word 

•	Good written and spoken English communication skills 

•	Willingness to work night shift (aligned with U.S. time zones) 

•	Reliable and professional in a remote work environment 



Preferred

•	CPA (Philippines or U.S.), or currently pursuing licensure 

•	Experience with nonprofit or church accounting 

•	Experience working with U.S. clients or CPA firms 

•	Familiarity with QuickBooks or similar accounting software 



Technical Requirements

•	Processor: Intel i5 (8th gen or higher) or AMD Ryzen 5 (or equivalent) 

•	RAM: Minimum 16 GB 

•	Operating System: Windows 11 or Mac (compatible with required tools) 

•	Internet: Minimum 20 Mbps download / 10 Mbps upload 

•	Backup internet connection required 

•	Three monitors

•	Noise-canceling headset and HD webcam 

•	Quiet, professional workspace 



Faith & Culture



Dennison CPA is a faith-based firm serving Christian ministries. We value tea
mbers who:

•	Have a personal relationship with Jesus Christ 

•	Regularly attend a local church 

•	Are comfortable participating in team devotionals and prayer 

•	Desire to use their professional skills to serve churches and ministries 



Why This Role is Different



This is not just another offshore accounting job. You’ll gain:

•	Exposure to U.S. audit engagements 

•	A clear career path within a growing CPA firm 

•	Work that directly impacts churches and ministries

title: Salesforce Automation tester
description:
Job description:



Job Title: Automation Tester for Salesforce



Location: Philippines / Remote



Working Hours: Part-time, Permanent, Fully flexible anytime







About Application House:



Application House is a Salesforce consulting agency that operates three different business models consulting, product development and support.

We are truly reflecting the name House of the Application. We are developing a very advanced Application/Product that includes an Artificial Intelligence App including LLM hosted services, products like Uber, GCash, Grab, SMS/WhatsApp Messaging App, Fundraising & Payment App, etc.

Are you excited to join a brilliant, intelligent team? Then why wait? Go ahead and apply the role.





Role Overview



The Automation Tester will design, develop, and maintain automated test scripts for Application House’s Salesforce products using UTAM (UI Test Automation Model), Selenium WebDriver, and other automation test frameworks.

The tester will ensure end-to-end regression coverage for Lightning components, LWC-based UIs, and Salesforce UI, supporting CI/CD quality gates on the Salesforce platform.

This role involves working closely with developers, admins, and product managers to ensure that every release meets Application House’s high standards for reliability, performance, and user experience.





Key Responsibilities:



Design and develop automated UI tests using UTAM, Selenium, and other supported Salesforce automation frameworks.

Develop and maintain end-to-end regression suites for Salesforce managed packages (Lightning Web Components, Apex Controllers, Triggers, Flows).

Build data-driven test scripts for multiple Salesforce org environments (sandbox, UAT, production).

Integrate test execution within CI/CD pipelines (GitHub Actions / Bitbucket / Jenkins).

Collaborate with developers to identify automation candidates during sprint planning.

Maintain automation codebase, modular test models, and reusable components.

Log, track, and verify defects in Jira, working with developers for resolution.

Support cross-browser and device testing (Chrome, Edge, Firefox).

Ensure positive/negative test coverage for Lightning Record Pages and Salesforce UI.

Prepare test documentation: automation scripts, test data setup, test reports, and coverage metrics.

Contribute to manual-to-automation transition, reducing regression testing effort.

Stay current with Salesforce test automation tools, particularly UTAM, Provar, and Salesforce Testing Frameworks.





Required Skills & Experience



2–3 years of experience in software testing, including automation testing.

Hands-on with UTAM, Selenium, WebDriverIO, or Provar.

Good understanding of Salesforce data model, custom objects, triggers, flows, and Lightning pages.

Strong knowledge of JavaScript or Java for automation scripting.

Familiarity with CI/CD and version control tools (Git, Jenkins, Bitbucket).

Proficient in using Test Management tools (Jira, TestRail).

Excellent analytical, debugging, and problem-solving skills.

Ability to work collaboratively in Agile/Scrum environments.





Preferred Qualifications:



Salesforce Certified Administrator or Platform App Builder (advantageous).

Experience testing Salesforce projects.

Knowledge of Salesforce DX, Scratch Orgs, and Packaging Automation.

Familiarity with Salesforce UTAM Page Object Model and JSON-based configuration.

Understanding of Salesforce Lightning Design System (SLDS) and UI selectors.





Tools & Technologies:



UTAM Framework (Salesforce official UI automation tool)

Selenium / WebDriver / WebDriverIO

Git / Jenkins / Bitbucket

Jira / TestRail / Confluence

Visual Studio Code with Salesforce CLI





Why Join Application House:

title: E-Commerce Product Listing Manager
description:
We're a growing technology reseller and eCommerce operations company looking for a reliable, senior-level Listing Manager to join us on a long-term basis. You won't just be managing listings — you'll be a core part of how we build and scale our catalog operations.



This is a hands-on role. You'll own the listings process end to end, work directly with our team, and have real say in how things are run.



**What You'll Own:**

- Publishing and optimizing product listings across e-commerce platforms

- Maintaining high listing quality and consistency across our catalog

- Managing and leading the listings team

- Becoming a true specialist in our products



**What We're Looking For:**

- Extensive hands-on experience with e-commerce listings (Amazon, Shopify, or similar)

- Proven managerial experience — you've led a team and can do it again

- Strong familiarity with consumer technology — you know the products, the specs, and the space

- Exceptional English — professional, precise, and polished

- Someone who can take full ownership and run this operation independently



The right person for this role takes their work seriously. You're someone who holds high standards, keeps things organized, knows how to lead people without micromanaging, and can juggle multiple moving parts without dropping the ball. You sweat the details — and you make sure your team does too.



If you've built and managed listing operations before and are ready to do it at a high level, we want to hear from you.



To be considered for the E-Commerce Product Listing Manager position, please submit your CV, a few samples of your work, and a list of five (5) qualifications that make you a strong candidate for this role. Also use the subject line Im the Manager To apply for the E-Commerce Product Listing Manager position, please provide the following:

Your CV link with Public view

title: Full time youtube video editor(faceless channel) $30 per video + paid test project
description:
Job Title:

Full-Time YouTube Video Editor (Faceless Channels) – $30 per Video + Paid Test Project

Job Description:

We are launching new YouTube faceless channels and currently testing multiple niches (facts, top lists, motivational, finance, health, and others). We have a large bank of videos ready to produce and are looking to hire 3 skilled video editors to join our remote team on a full-time basis.

You will receive the script and voiceover (at the beginning). Over time, we will train you to create your own high-quality voiceovers using ElevenLabs. Experience with ElevenLabs is a big plus.

Pay:

•  $30 per completed video (equivalent to ~$1 per minute of final edited video)

•  Paid test project: $10 for editing a 1-minute sample video

•  Consistent full-time workload with long-term opportunity and potential for growth

What You Will Do:

•  Source your own relevant stock footage, B-roll, and images based on the script

•  Edit 10–30 minute engaging faceless YouTube videos

•  Add smooth cuts, dynamic transitions, text overlays, subtitles/captions, zoom/pan effects (Ken Burns), sound design, and background music

•  Color correct footage, enhance audio, and optimize pacing for high viewer retention

•  Deliver polished, YouTube-ready videos with proper organization

Requirements (Must-Have):

•  At least 1–2 years of professional video editing experience (YouTube faceless or similar channels preferred)

•  Strong proficiency in Adobe Premiere Pro (DaVinci Resolve or Final Cut Pro acceptable)

•  Strong English proficiency – you must fully understand scripts and content to choose appropriate visuals and timing

•  Ability to find and select high-quality, relevant stock footage/B-roll that matches the script and niche

•  Experience with or willingness to learn ElevenLabs for voiceover generation (big plus if you already have it)

•  Reliable high-speed internet and a powerful computer for smooth 1080p/4K editing

•  Excellent time management – able to deliver high-quality work on tight deadlines

•  Self-motivated, detail-oriented, and able to work independently with minimal supervision

How to Apply (Important – Follow Instructions Carefully):

1.  Provide links to 3–5 examples of your best edited YouTube-style videos (faceless channels preferred – include links with timestamps if possible).

2.  In your application message, include:

 •  Your years of video editing experience

 •  Editing software you are strongest with

 •  Your average turnaround time for a 10–20 minute video

 •  Confirmation that you can source your own stock footage/B-roll

 •  Any experience with ElevenLabs or AI voice tools (optional but mention if you have it)

3.  We will review portfolios and invite selected applicants to complete a paid test project ($10). You will receive a short raw sample (script + voiceover) and instructions to edit a 1-minute test video, including sourcing appropriate stock footage.

Only complete applications with strong portfolio examples will be considered. We need 3 editors to start immediately so we can quickly test different niches.

If you’re a talented, reliable editor who can create engaging faceless videos and grow with us, apply now!

Apply Now to send your application with portfolio links.

title: Marketing Assistant
description:
Job Title: Marketing Assistant



Location: Remote (Company HQ is located in San Diego, CA, USA)

Position Type: Full-Time / Contract

Industry: Biotechnology / Medtech / Greentech Innovation



About Aquillius Innovation Hubs



Aquillius is building a bicoastal innovation ecosystem headquartered in San Diego, California, with an expanding network of innovation hubs in Montgomery County, Maryland. We connect the entrepreneurial energy and deep tech ecosystem of Southern California with the research institutions, federal agencies, and policy leadership of the MD/DC corridor — bringing together founders, investors, researchers, corporations, and community leaders to accelerate the development and commercialization of new ideas.



Aquillius hubs also serve as a premier landing point for international startups entering the U.S. market. By providing immediate access to lab and office infrastructure, a built-in founder community, and direct connections to investors, corporate partners, and government resources, Aquillius gives international companies a soft landing — reducing the friction of U.S. market entry and accelerating their path to traction, funding, and growth.



By linking resources, talent, and opportunities across both coasts and around the world, we create a collaborative environment where startups can scale faster, partnerships can thrive, and innovation drives economic growth in both regions and beyond.



Position Summary



The Marketing Assistant is a creative, detail-oriented contributor who supports the Marketing Director and Events & Community Coordinator in executing Aquillius’s brand strategy, content production, and community engagement across digital platforms. This role is ideal for someone with a strong eye for design, a passion for social media storytelling, and hands-on experience — or a genuine eagerness to develop skills — in video and podcast editing. You will play a visible role in shaping how Aquillius communicates its mission to founders, investors, and innovators across two coasts and beyond.



Key Responsibilities



Graphic Design & Visual Content

• Design social media graphics, infographics, digital ads, event flyers, web banners,
 headers, and presentation decks that reflect the Aquillius brand.

• Maintain brand consistency in typography, color, and visual style across all marketing collateral and platforms.

• Support production of the Aquillius Annual Impact Report and other high-visibility design deliverables.

• Organize and maintain digital asset libraries, design files, and brand resource folders.

• Source and edit photography and imagery for use across channels.

• Assist with design requests from the Marketing Director and Events & Community Coordinator as needed.



Social Media Management

• Manage daily activity across Aquillius’s social media platforms — including LinkedIn, Instagram,
, and X 
) — with a focus on consistent, high-quality content.

• Develop and maintain a content calendar, scheduling posts in advance using social media management tools.

• Create platform-native content — short-form video, Reels, Stories, carousels, and graphics — optimized for each channel.

• Monitor engagement, respond to comments and messages, and track follower growth and audience analytics.

• Research trending topics, hashtags, and industry conversations relevant to the biotech, medtech, and greentech sectors.

• Identify opportunities for member spotlights, event recaps, and ecosystem storytelling across channels.



Video & Podcast Editing

• Edit video content for social media, event recaps, founder spotlights, and promotional campaigns — including cuts, captions, graphics, and music.

• Produce short-form video assets optimized for Instagram Reels, LinkedIn, YouTube, and other platforms.

• Edit podcast episodes for the Aquillius content library, including audio cleanup, leveling, intro/outro integration, and export for distribution.

• Support the creation of audiogram graphics and short video clips to promote podcast content on social media.

• Maintain an organized archive of raw and edited video and audio files.

• Collaborate with the Marketing Director on content strategy for video and audio programming.



Marketing Campaign Support

• Assist in executing digital marketing campaigns across social media,
, and content channels.

• Help coordinate campaign timelines, track deliverables, and ensure projects are completed on schedule.

• Track and compile campaign performance metrics and prepare summary reports for the Marketing Director.

• Conduct market research and competitive analysis to support marketing strategy.



 Marketing

• Assist in building and scheduling
 marketing campaigns for member communications, event promotion, and newsletter outreach.

• Help build and segment
 lists and maintain CRM databases.

• Proofread and quality-check marketing materials for accuracy, tone, and brand consistency.



Community & Event Support

• Assist the Events & Community Coordinator in promoting hub events, workshops, demo days, and networking programming across digital channels.

• Engage with the Aquillius online community — responding to inquiries, amplifying member content, and fostering conversation.

• Support member onboarding communications and provide information about hub offerings and programs.

• Maintain organized records of community interactions and content performance.



Qualifications



Required

• Associate’s or Bachelor’s degree in Marketing, Graphic Design, Communications, or a related field — or equivalent professional experience.

• 1–2 years of experience in marketing, graphic design, social media, or a related role.

• Proficiency in Adobe Creative Suite (Photoshop, Illustrator, InDesign) and/or Canva.

• Demonstrated experience creating graphics and visual content for social media platforms.

• Experience with or strong willingness to learn video editing software (e.g., Adobe Premiere Pro, Final Cut Pro, CapCut, or DaVinci Resolve).

• Experience with or strong willingness to learn podcast/audio editing tools (e.g., Adobe Audition, Descript, GarageBand, or Hindenburg).

• Familiarity with social media platforms and best practices, including LinkedIn, Instagram,
, and X.

• Strong written and verbal communication skills with sharp attention to grammar and tone.

• Excellent organizational skills and keen attention to detail.

• Ability to work independently in a remote environment and manage time across multiple concurrent projects.



Preferred

• Experience with social media management tools such as Hootsuite, Buffer, or Later.

• Familiarity with
 marketing platforms (e.g., Mailchimp, HubSpot, or Constant Contact).

• Basic understanding of SEO and content marketing principles.

• Experience with project management tools such as Asana, Trello, or Microsoft Planner.

• Knowledge of Microsoft Office Suite and Google Workspace.

• Interest in biotechnology, medtech, greentech, or innovation ecosystems.

• Experience producing audiograms, Reels, or short-form video content for brand accounts.



What We Offer



• Meaningful work supporting a mission-driven organization at the intersection of innovation, entrepreneurship, and community.

• Hands-on experience with real marketing campaigns across design, social media, video, and podcast content.

• Mentorship from experienced marketing professionals and direct exposure to the innovation ecosystem.

• Opportunities for career growth in marketing, design, and content production.

• Flexible remote work environment.

• Engagement with a vibrant community of founders, investors, researchers, and changemakers across two coasts.

,

**Bid & Proposal Support**
