title: Insurance Specialist for Healthcare Account WFH role
description:
The Insurance Specialist is responsible for handling insurance verification, claims processing, and follow-ups for US-based healthcare accounts. This role ensures accurate and timely reimbursement by coordinating with insurance providers, resolving claim issues, and supporting patients with billing inquiries. The position requires strong attention to detail, knowledge of US healthcare insurance processes, and the ability to work in a fast-paced remote or BPO environment.



Key Responsibilities

Verify patient insurance eligibility, benefits, co-pays, deductibles, and authorization requirements for US healthcare plans

Submit and process claims accurately using appropriate coding (CPT, ICD, HCPCS)

Follow up with insurance companies (via phone or online portals) on unpaid or denied claims

Analyze and resolve claim denials, underpayments, and discrepancies

Prepare and submit claim corrections and appeals as needed

Communicate with US insurance payers to ensure timely reimbursement

Assist patients or clients with insurance-related inquiries and billing concerns

Maintain accurate documentation in billing systems and EHR platforms

Meet productivity, accuracy, and turnaround time targets set by the client or company

Ensure compliance with HIPAA and US healthcare regulations



Qualifications

High school diploma or equivalent; college level preferred

1–3+ years of experience in US healthcare billing, insurance verification, or claims processing (BPO experience preferred)

Strong understanding of US insurance types (Medicare, Medicaid, Commercial plans)

Familiarity with CPT, ICD-10, and HCPCS coding

Experience using EHR systems, billing software, and insurance portals

Excellent English communication skills (verbal and written)

Strong analytical and problem-solving skills

Ability to work night shift (US hours) and meet productivity targets



If you qualify and are interested in the job, please send your updated CV to 
 and we will get in touch with you for a quick interview.

title: SEO Content Writer - Virtual Assistant
description:
SEO Content Writer - Virtual Assistant (Part Time | Remote | 8 Hours Per Week)

Company: Ice Cold Spice

Website: 

Hours: 8 hours per week (x2 shifts) 

Rate: $4.50 USD per hour

Start Date: Monday 4th May 2026

Your Location: Working remotely for the UK business from the Philippines

Overtime: Available during busier periods at the same hourly rate

Contract: Long-term role (subject to 1 month trial period)



Why Work at Ice Cold Spice

Ice Cold Spice is an independent e-commerce retailer selling premium interior and outdoor brands to the UK market.

We are 12 months old, and growing rapidly. We’re looking for a reliable, detail-oriented SEO Content Writer on a part-time basis. You’ll kickstart our new, evergreen content engine designed to drive organic growth across strategic product categories. You will also build and format blog content in our Shopify page builder, GemPages, with a focus on clear structure, layout, and user-friendly UX that supports engagement and SEO. You’ll work within a small team of operations focussed VA’s and collaborate closely with the Founder, who has 10+ years’ experience working with some of the biggest brands in the UK. 

This is a practical, execution-focused role with real impact — ideal for someone who understands how content and technical SEO work together to drive traffic, rankings, and revenue.

 

Core Responsibilities

You will be responsible for researching, writing, and publishing weekly SEO-optimised blog content designed to grow overall organic visibility across key product categories. This includes producing buyer’s guides, niche deep-dives, and educational articles informed by UK search behaviour, keyword data, and emerging trends. 



Rather than producing generic content, you’ll approach each piece with a clear angle or hook, bringing original thinking and editorial judgement to ensure everything published offers genuine value and stands out from competitors.



You will implement on-page SEO best practices across all content, including structuring pages with clear H1 and H2 hierarchies, embedding target keywords naturally, and building internal links to relevant product and category pages. Where appropriate, you’ll also reference authoritative UK-based external sources to strengthen credibility.



Once written, you’ll format content in visually cohesive templates using our page builder, GemPages, ensuring strong layout, clear structure, and a user-friendly experience. This is a drag-and-drop solution, so no coding experience is required.



You'll monitor traffic, impressions and keyword ranking results over time and communicate observations in Slack.



Secondary Responsibilities

Alongside content creation, you will support ongoing technical SEO improvements across the site. This includes conducting regular site audits to identify and resolve issues such as broken links, redirect chains, duplicate content, and metadata gaps. You will also take ownership of bulk on-site optimisation tasks, including improving image file names, compressing images to improve load times, and contributing to overall site performance.



You will monitor performance using tools such as Google Search Console, keeping track of crawl health, indexing, and Core Web Vitals, while proactively flagging any issues that may impact page speed or user experience. Throughout all work, you’ll maintain a consistent brand tone of voice while balancing SEO performance with readability and user experience.

We’d love you to show your personality in response to this application by sharing a photo of your favourite music artist and tell us why you like them, along with the other application criteria.

 

Additional Responsibilities

As the business grows, responsibilities may evolve over time. Any changes to scope will be communicated in advance.

 

Training & Support

You will be provided with structured training in the form of Loom videos, designed to ensure consistency and clarity across tasks. While support is available, the role requires someone who is comfortable working independently once onboarded.

Ongoing communication will take place via Slack, with additional quarterly video call check-in calls. All working time must be tracked using Hubstaff, and you will report directly to the Founder. All required tools, systems, and logins will be provided.

 

Working Hours & Availability

You will work 8 hours a week. You may choose the fixed x2 4-hour shifts that suit your availability. This will then be set in Hubstaff. During these hours, you are expected to be fully dedicated to Ice Cold Spice and not work on tasks for other companies. From time to time, additional hours may be offered in advance. Philippine public holidays are observed however the total weekly commitment remains 8 hours. Where a public holiday falls on a scheduled workday, those hours may be worked on an alternative day by prior agreement.

 

Essential Requirements

• Proven experience writing SEO-driven content that has driven measured organic results for ecommerce brands

• A solid grasp of technical SEO fundamentals 

• Experience with SEO tools

• Comfortable navigating ecommerce environments

• Strong written and verbal English 

• Confident working independently

• High level of accuracy and attention to detail

 

Technical & Working Setup Requirements

• Reliable laptop or desktop (Windows or macOS) with at least 8GB RAM

• Fast, stable broadband internet (minimum 20 Mbps download / 5 Mbps upload, higher speeds preferred).

• Ability to provide a recent internet speed test screenshot and ISP details.

• Backup internet option (e.g. mobile hotspot)

• Quiet, professional workspace

• Working webcam

• Reasonable power backup solution

• Reliable VPN with UK endpoints

 

Trial Period

This role will begin with a 1-month trial period to ensure the role is a good fit for both you and the business. Performance, communication, reliability, and adherence to agreed working hours and processes will be reviewed during this time. Successful completion of the trial will lead to continuation in this long-term role. Ongoing success in this role means consistently publishing high-quality content that ranks and drives meaningful traffic, while also improving site health and proactively resolving SEO issues. Over time, your work should contribute directly to increased organic visibility, stronger category performance, and measurable commercial impact.

 

Pay Review

After 12 months, there will be an opportunity for a pay review, based on performance and the scope of responsibilities at that time.

 

How to Apply

Please include:

• Your preferred set working days and hours Monday-Sunday (in PHT)

• Your CV

• Screenshots/portfolio of previous SEO Content work and results

• A screenshot of a recent internet speed test with ISP/package details

• A 1-minute video recording, clearly showing your face, where you introduce yourself, explain why you are applying for Ice Cold Spice and why a part time role suits you, and talk about the range of products on our website and what you think about them.



Interview Process & Start Date

• Shortlisted applicants will be invited to a 30-minute video interview with the Founder. This is an opportunity to discuss your experience, learn more about the role, and ask any questions about the business. 

• Interviews will be conducted on a rolling basis from W/C 20 April, with available time slots provided in advance to choose from.

• There will be a second stage interview with a task.

• You must be available to start from Monday 4 May 2026.

title: Senior Full-Stack Developer (DeFi and NFT Projects)
description:
About Us

LP Bonds. Live DeFi protocol. 8+ chains. 50+ pools. Real users. Real TVL. We built this with a team most startups would call "impossible." We're not looking for someone who's done 10 years of safe corporate blockchain work. We're looking for someone who's hungry enough to own an entire protocol's technical stack and sharp enough to not break it.



THE ROLE

 You own everything technical. Smart contracts. Frontend. Backend. New chain deployments. DEX integrations. Infrastructure. There's no senior engineer above you to review your code. There's no architect drawing diagrams for you. You are the engineering department.



WHAT YOU'LL DO:

Solidity & Contracts:

- Deploy and manage production smart contracts across EVM chains - Bond NFTs, LP vaults, yield engines, upgrade systems, marketplace

- Ship new chain deployments end-to-end. We hand you a chain, you hand us live contracts.

- Integrate with DEX protocols (Camelot, PancakeSwap, Uniswap) at the contract level

- Security is your religion. You think about how things break before you think about how they work.



Frontend:

- React/Next.js - build and maintain the full user-facing application

- Web3 wallet integrations, stats dashboard, Bond NFT marketplace

- If the UI is broken, it's your problem. If it's slow, it's your problem.



Backend & Infra:

- Node.js API, MongoDB, IPFS

- Multi-chain indexing and event monitoring

- Keep 8+ chain deployments healthy simultaneously



WHO YOU ARE:

- You've written Solidity that's been deployed to mainnet. Even once. Even small. You've felt the weight of real money in your contract.

- You can build a full-stack app alone. Not "I contributed to a team project" - you built it.

- You learn by doing, not by asking. You hit a wall, you Google it, you read the docs, you figure it out, you ship.

- You're not waiting for permission. You see something broken, you fix it. You see something missing, you build it.

- You're young, hungry, and slightly terrified of how much responsibility this is. Good. That fear keeps you sharp.





WE CARE ABOUT:

- What you've shipped. Show us. Links or it didn't happen.

- How fast you learn when thrown into something you've never done

- Whether you take ownership or make excuses

- Whether you stay up until 3am because the bug is bothering you, not because someone told you to



This is a small team building something most of DeFi hasn't figured out yet. You will be stretched. You will ship things you didn't think you could ship. You will learn more here than anywhere else because there's no one to hide behind.



If that excites you, apply. If it scares you, even better - apply anyway.

Guaranteed Base Pay: You will receive $10/hour (capped at 10 hours/week),       for simply activating your network. 50% paid in Ethereum (ETH) for immediate cash and 50% in $GMI tokens, which are subject to an 18-month vesting schedule, building a long-term position in the $GMI mutli-chain ecosystem.

Note: A "successful partnership" is defined by the project signing the LP Bonds integration agreement and going live on our marketplace.

 relationships with project founders or marketing heads

YOU DON’T NEED:

 handle

title: Realistic AI Content Creator — Luxury Beauty & Hair Brands
description:
Realistic AI Content Creator — Luxury Beauty & Hair Brands



**Company:** Multi-brand beauty business (New York City)

**Location:** Remote

**Type:** Part-Time to Full-Time (ongoing role)

**Rate:** $5-$8/hour depending on experience and skill level



---



## About Us



We are a New York City-based luxury beauty brand operating across three businesses:



- a high-end, appointment-only salon specializing in invisible K-tip hair extension installs

- a luxury European hair extension and hair product company

- a business education platform for beauty professionals and stylists



We have a strong social media presence with a mid-six-figure following and a brand aesthetic that is confident, elevated, aspirational, and unbothered. We need someone who can create AI-generated content that matches this energy and looks indistinguishable from real content.



---



## What You'll Be Doing



**AI Photo & Image Creation**

- Create realistic AI-generated photos for social media feeds, ads, and website use

- Produce lifestyle imagery that fits our luxury brand aesthetic (think: editorial, high-end, aspirational)

- Generate product mockups and styled product shots for Arve (hair extensions, packaging, lifestyle settings)

- Create branded graphics and visual content for School of Business promotions and launches



**AI Video Creation**

- Produce realistic AI-generated video content including talking head style clips, UGC-style content, and product showcase videos

- Create short-form video content optimized for Instagram Reels and TikTok

- Generate AI video ads for paid campaigns across all three brands

- Ensure all video content looks natural and realistic — not obviously AI-generated



**Product Mockups & Lifestyle Content**

- Create styled product photography using AI (flat lays, lifestyle scenes, luxury settings)

- Generate aspirational lifestyle imagery that aligns with the brand world of each business

- Produce before/after style content and transformation visuals for the salon brand

- Create mockups for new product launches, packaging concepts, and marketing campaigns



**Platform-Specific Content**

- Adapt content for Instagram (Feed, Reels, Stories), TikTok, website banners, and paid ad creatives

- Understand aspect ratios, platform specs, and what performs well on each platform

- Deliver content in the correct formats and resolutions ready to post or publish



---



## Who You Are



**Required:**

- Proven experience creating realistic AI-generated images AND video content — you must include samples in your application

- Proficiency with current AI tools such as Midjourney, DALL-E, Stable Diffusion, Kling AI, Runway ML, Hailuo AI, HeyGen, or similar platforms

- Strong eye for luxury aesthetics — you understand what high-end, editorial, and aspirational content looks like

- Ability to create content that does NOT look obviously AI-generated — realism is non-negotiable

- Understanding of social media content formats for Instagram and TikTok

- Ability to match and maintain brand consistency across different content pieces

- Fast turnaround — ability to deliver content within 24–48 hours of a brief

- Excellent communication and ability to take creative direction



**Preferred:**

- Experience creating content for beauty, fashion, hair, or luxury brands

- Video editing skills (CapCut, Premiere Pro, or similar)

- Experience creating ad creatives for
/Instagram and TikTok ads

- Understanding of what content performs well organically vs. paid

- Ability to write short-form copy or captions to pair with visuals

- Experience with AI voice cloning or lip sync tools for video content



---



## Tools You Should Know (Some or All)



**Image Generation:** Midjourney, DALL-E 3, Stable Diffusion, Leonardo AI, Flux

**Video Generation:** Kling AI, Runway ML, Hailuo AI, HeyGen, Synthesia, Pika Labs

**Editing & Post-Production:** Photoshop, Lightroom, CapCut, Premiere Pro, After Effects, Canva

**AI Enhancement:** Topaz AI, Magnific AI, FaceSwap tools, upscaling tools



We don't expect you to use all of these — but you should be fluent in at least 2–3 tools from each category and always be learning what's new.



---



## What We Expect



- **Realism first.** If it looks fake, it doesn't get posted. We have a discerning audience and our brand reputation depends on quality.

- **Brand consistency.** Every piece of content should feel like it belongs to our world — luxury, clean, elevated, confident.

- **Proactive creativity.** We don't want someone who only executes briefs. We want someone who brings ideas, references, and creative direction to the table.

- **Speed and reliability.** We move fast. Deadlines are deadlines.

- **Confidentiality.** You will be creating content that our audience may not know is AI-generated. Discretion is required.



---



## Volume & Schedule



- Expect to produce 15–30+ content pieces per week across all three brands (mix of images, videos, and ad creatives)

- Weekly content planning calls or async check-ins

- Must be available during U.S. business hours (EST) for at least a few overlapping hours for communication



---



## Why Work With Us



- Work across three distinct brands with different creative needs — you'll never be bored

- Long-term, ongoing role with room to grow as we scale

- Work directly with the founder — your creative input matters

- Be at the forefront of AI content creation in the luxury beauty space

- Opportunity to build a portfolio of high-end brand work



---



## To Apply



**Your application MUST include:**



1. **3–5 samples of realistic AI-generated images you've created** — beauty, fashion, or lifestyle content strongly preferred. If you don't include samples, your application will not be considered.

2. **1–2 samples of AI-generated video content** (if you have them — this will put you ahead of other applicants)

3. **The AI tools you currently use** and which ones you're most skilled with

4. **Your available hours per week and hourly rate**

5. **A brief explanation of your creative process** — how do you go from a brand brief to a finished piece of content?



We are hiring immediately. If your work is strong, we'll move fast.

title: Experienced Cold Caller / Appointment Setter Needed for Digital Marketing Services
description:
We are an outbound lead generation agency that helps digital marketing agencies connect with home improvement businesses (plumbing, pest control, roofing, and similar companies) who will benefit from the marketing help (SEO, Google Maps Ranking, Google Ads, Google Business Profile Optimization, etc.)



We are looking for a highly disciplined cold caller (aka. appointment setter) who enjoys speaking with business owners and booking qualified meetings.



You will not be working alone. You will be part of a structured calling system with scripts, materials, and ongoing support from experienced callers and the founder.



Your primary responsibility will be to contact business owners and determine whether they are open to taking on new jobs, then schedule appointments for our clients.



This is a long-term role with opportunities to grow into positions such as:

- Cold Calling Team Manager

- High-Ticket Sales Representative

- Internal Sales Coach

& others



If you are consistent, coachable, and enjoy outbound communication, this role can become a stable long-term opportunity.



1) What Makes This Role Different?



Unlike typical freelance calling roles, you will work inside a structured system with real support.



You will receive:

- Proven scripts and calling frameworks

- Structured training on the system (from multi 4-figure business coaching & courses)

- Live feedback and call reviews

- Weekly team calls

- Mindset training (for continuous growth & support)

- A supportive team of other callers

- Direct guidance from the founder



Your job is execution. The strategy, systems, and materials are already prepared.



2) Who You Will Be Calling?



You will contact home improvement contractors, including:

- Plumbing companies

- Pest control companies

- Roofing companies

- Similar residential service businesses



Your goal is to determine whether they have the capacity to take on additional jobs and schedule a meeting with our client if appropriate.



3) Your Responsibilities



Your work will include:

- Calling business owners using a provided lead list

- Following the provided scripts and frameworks

- Qualifying prospects based on simple criteria

- Booking appointments for our clients

- Logging calls and outcomes in the tracking sheet

- Participating in team feedback sessions



Tools you will use include:

- GoHighLevel

- Google Sheets

- Notion

title: Job Title: Google Merchant Center Specialist (E-commerce / Shopify / Compliance)
description:
We are a fast-growing e-commerce agency specializing in Google Merchant Center approvals and account recovery for dropshipping brands. This role will transform in to a full time job.



We are looking for a highly experienced Google Merchant Center Specialist who understands the full ecosystem — from diagnosing disapprovals to executing fixes at both the account and website level.



This is not a beginner role. We are looking for someone who can think independently, move fast, and work closely with our internal team.



???? What You’ll Be Doing

Analyze Google Merchant Center accounts and identify all negative signals and policy violations

Diagnose website-level issues affecting approvals (trust signals, compliance, structure, etc.)

Work from detailed internal reports and execute required changes

Submit and manage appeals, reviews, and communication with Google

Implement fixes directly in Shopify stores

Upload and manage products in a fully compliant way

Coordinate with AI image creators to ensure product images meet compliance standards

Collaborate closely with our team to ensure fast turnaround and high success rates

? Requirements

Proven experience with Google Merchant Center approvals & disapprovals

Deep understanding of Google policies and how to navigate them

Experience handling account suspensions, misrepresentation issues, and product disapprovals

Strong experience with Shopify (product uploads, store edits, structure)

Ability to identify issues on a website beyond just GMC (trust, UX, compliance signals)

Experience with submitting appeals and communicating with Google support

Ability to follow structured processes while also thinking independently

Strong communication skills and ability to work within a team

? Bonus (Not Required, But Valuable)

Experience working with dropshipping stores

Understanding of conversion-focused store structures

Experience working with AI-generated product images

Familiarity with scaling e-commerce brands

???? How We Work

We provide clear reports and direction on what needs to be fixed

You execute and ensure everything is implemented correctly

Fast communication and reliability are key

We move quickly and expect the same from you

???? Who This Is For



This role is for someone who:



Has already worked extensively with GMC and knows how to get accounts approved

Can spot issues quickly and doesn’t need hand-holding

Wants to be part of a high-performance e-commerce team



If you have real experience with Google Merchant Center and Shopify, apply with examples of accounts you’ve worked on and results you’ve achieved.

title: Amazon sourcer
description:
ONLINE ARBITRAGE

Looking to grow our team!Seeking one part time position who will undergo a trial period of one week paid before being brought on as part time.



We are more than an Amazon arbitrage (OA) business. If you seek a long term, advancing position, this is for you.



PSA

We have systems in place to ensure we don’t bring on any bad actors. If you plan on sending us leads that are being shared across other businesses or you are pulling items off of a leads list, you will be let go immediately.



We are seeking a part time product sourcer who can grow in our company and later be promoted to a higher paid managerial role. If you are not a hard worker and can’t prove it to us over our interview process, don’t even bother completing this application.



Job Responsibilities

Tasked with sourcing in-stock 3-6 leads a day.



Follow up, build and maintain SOPs.



Requirements

Keepa experience required

Seller Amp (SAS) experience

Online Arbitrage experience

Familiar with manual, reverse/storefront stalking, keepa product finder

Understanding ROI, margin and sales rank

Ability to work part time (20 hours per week)

Reliable internet Compensation & Benefits

Unlimited PTO

Holidays Off

Bonuses which will be discussed

Communication Skills



This should be simple, we're looking for people who don't need much supervision. Someone that is dependable and eager to work. We know this is a very competitive market and we are looking for a rockstar tea
mber we can rely on for years and years to come. We need someone who pays attention to detail and understands how to properly read data. We expect the majority of the items to be shared with our team to be purchasable and pass all of our SOP checks.  Loyalty is the most important thing to our team. We're looking for people who want to stay with us long term and can see themselves in management /senior roles. If you've read this far, congratulations as I've found out many don't. Please put your favorite fruit as the title of your application.

Furthermore, we will not be accepting any candidates who already work for another client as we need exclusivity. 
 will be required for team communications.



If you want your application expedited please send over 3 leads researched from the same day of your application.

Include Supplier Link & Amazon US link.

This is our criteria.

Low sales rank

Minimum 30% ROI

Keepa chart shows low odds of going below break even price



In addition please answer the following questions in your application submission.

Have you been previously employed to be an online arbitrage sourcer?

If so, why did you leave your current candidate?

How many monitors do you have?

Why should we choose you as one of our candidates?

What is your favorite sport and why ? 

Do you have a Seller Amp and Keepa subscription?



Thanks for taking the time out of your day to apply, best of luck!

Sent from my iPhone

title: Production / Junior Graphic Designer
description:
JOB TITLE: Production / Junior Graphic Designer (Packaging & Print Production)

LOCATION: Offshore (Remote)

INDUSTRY: Beauty, cosmetics, personal care or consumer products is a plus but not required.

MUST HAVE A PORTFOLIO TO BE CONSIDERED

If you do not meet these initial requirements, applicants will not be considered.



Position Overview

We are seeking a detail-oriented Production / Junior Graphic Designer with hands-on experience in packaging and print production. This role is ideal for someone who thrives in a fast-paced environment, has a strong eye for layout and typography, and understands the technical side of preparing files for production. You will support the creative team in executing high-quality design assets while ensuring accuracy and brand consistency.



Key Responsibilities

• Prepare and productionize packaging artwork for print, including cartons, labels, and component decoration

• Create and update mechanicals, dielines, and prepress-ready files

• Ensure all artwork meets printer/vendor specifications (color profiles, bleeds, trims, etc.)

• Execute layout design for marketing collateral such as brochures, inserts, displays, and retail graphics

• Manage versioning, revisions, and file organization across multiple SKUs and product lines

• Collaborate with designers, marketing, and cross-functional teams to meet deadlines and project goals

• Review proofs to ensure color accuracy and quality standards

• Maintain brand consistency across all materials



Qualifications

• 1–3 years of experience in graphic design with a focus on print and packaging production

• Strong proficiency in Adobe Creative Suite (Illustrator, InDesign, Photoshop, Acrobat Pro)

• Solid understanding of print production processes, color management (CMYK/Pantone), and file setup

• Experience working with dielines, packaging structures, and vendor specs

• High attention to detail with strong organizational skills

• Ability to manage multiple projects and meet tight deadlines

• Strong communication and collaboration skills



Preferred Qualifications

• Experience in the beauty, cosmetics, or consumer packaged goods (CPG) industry

• Familiarity with packaging materials, finishes (foil, emboss, spot UV), and sustainability considerations

• Basic retouching or image editing skills

• Experience with digital asset management systems

title: B2B SaaS Sales Representative – Legal Tech / Law Firm Accounts (Clio & MyCase)
description:
About the Company:

We are a growing B2B SaaS company offering an
 capture tool that integrates with leading legal practice management platforms including Clio and MyCase. We help law firms grow and nurture their client lists through smart, high-converting opt-in forms and automations — turning website visitors into booked consultations.



Role Overview:

We are looking for a highly experienced B2B SaaS Sales Representative who has experience selling into law firms and understands the legal tech space. You will be responsible for prospecting, demoing, closing, and onboarding law firm accounts onto our platform. Familiarity with Clio and/or MyCase is a strong advantage, as our product integrates directly with these tools.



Responsibilities:

- Prospect and outreach to law firms (solo practitioners, small to mid-size firms) via
, phone, and LinkedIn

- Conduct product demos via video call (Zoom/Google Meet) tailored to the needs of law firm clients

- Clearly communicate how our tool integrates with Clio and MyCase to enhance their client acquisition efforts

- Manage and follow up with prospects throughout the B2B sales pipeline to close deals

- Onboard new law firm accounts: guide clients through initial platform setup and configuration

- Manage and update the CRM (HubSpot) with accurate lead and customer data

- Create and manage tasks and workflows in ClickUp

- Provide post-sale support to ensure smooth account activation and client satisfaction

- Collaborate with the team using Google Workspace and AI tools (including Claude) for efficiency

- Identify upsell opportunities within the existing law firm client base

- Provide regular sales activity reports and performance updates



Requirements:

- Highly experienced in B2B SaaS sales (required)

- Experience selling to law firms or in the legal tech industry is strongly preferred

- Familiarity with Clio and/or MyCase (required or willingness to learn quickly)

- Proven track record of closing B2B deals and achieving sales targets

- Experience conducting professional software demos and product walkthroughs

- Hands-on experience with HubSpot CRM (required)

- Proficiency with ClickUp, Google Workspace (Gmail, Docs, Sheets, Drive)

- Comfortable using AI tools (e.g., Claude, ChatGPT) to improve productivity

- Excellent written and verbal communication skills in English

- Self-motivated, proactive, and able to work independently in a remote environment

- Reliable internet connection and professional home office setup



Work Setup:

- 100% Remote

- Part-time (flexible hours, with availability to align with US business hours required)

- Immediate start available



If you are a results-driven B2B SaaS sales professional with experience in legal tech or selling to law firms — we want to hear from you!

title: Operations Admin
description:
We're Bespoke Stay a short-term rental company managing high-performing homes in PA, DE, FL, NJ. Our guests expect 5-star stays. Our owners expect tight operations, fast responses, and no loose ends.



That’s where you come in.



We’re hiring an Operations Admin VA to help us behind the scenes. Damage claims, cleaner invoices, refund tracking, guest chargebacks — all the little fires that pop up after checkout. We need someone who can stay organized, follow through, and keep things moving even when the rest of the team is offline.



What You’ll Be Doing:



• Send a short daily update in Slack (what you finished, what’s pending)

• File insurance damage claims with proper documentation

• Fill in light guest or messaging support as needed messages via Hostaway, Airbnb, VRBO, and Slack threads

• Escalate maintenance or access issues using internal SOPs

• Track vendor invoices and flag missing ones

• Help log maintenance receipts and guest refunds

• Flag urgent or unusual cases for internal review and documentation

• Coordinate refunds, chargebacks, and expense tracking with our bookkeeper

• Follow up with cleaners, vendors, and field staff to confirm resolution and updates



This is a detail-heavy role. If you like checklists, folders, and clear finish lines, you’ll do great here.



A Bit About You:



• You’re organized, dependable, and don’t need to be micromanaged

• You write clearly and double-check your work

• You’ve done some kind of STR, admin, or bookkeeping support before

• You’re comfortable using Spreadsheets, Slack, and maybe a PMS like Hostaway



The Job:



• Full-time, 8 hours per day, 5 days per week

• Shift: Monday through Friday, 7AM to 5PM PM Eastern Time

• Starting pay is $3.50 USD/hour

• First raise after 6 months, second after 12 months based on performance

• One full week of training (Monday through Friday) before you begin your regular shift

• After training, your shift will rotate every 90 days to support team needs



How to Apply:



 us at 
 with the subject line “I want to be an ops assistant” Include a link to your OnlineJobs.ph profile in the
. We’ll reply with a Google Form. Fill it out completely. One of the questions will ask your age - to show you're paying attention, answer "40". Only complete applications will be reviewed.



We’re excited to find someone who wants to grow with us and help keep the backend of this business running smooth.

title: Full-Time Video Editor (Short-Form Focus, High-Volume Content)
description:
About Skin Safeguard



Skin Safeguard is building the professional standard for pore-clearing and extraction tools.



We work directly with licensed estheticians to create clinical, educational, and real-world treatment content that helps professionals improve technique, deliver better outcomes, and grow their business.



Our content is designed to build credibility, authority, and trust while driving product adoption at scale.



Role Overview



We are hiring a full-time video editor to transform raw footage into high-quality, high-performing content across Instagram, TikTok, and YouTube.



You will work with content from multiple contributors, including treatment footage, educational videos, and business-focused content. Your role is to ensure this content is edited clearly, consistently, and efficiently for daily distribution.



This is a production-focused role with a strong emphasis on consistency, speed, and attention to detail.



Key Responsibilities

Content Editing

Edit short-form videos (Reels, TikTok, YouTube Shorts) from raw footage

Edit occasional long-form YouTube content

Produce multiple edited videos per day

Editing Standards

Clean cuts and clear pacing

Professional text overlays and captions

Zooms and framing adjustments to maintain attention

Strong opening hooks within the first 1–3 seconds

Appropriate use of music and sound when needed

File Management

Organize footage and final outputs in Google Drive

Follow naming conventions and folder structures

Deliver completed videos daily for review

Content Types



You will be editing:



Close-up skincare treatment footage (extractions and procedures)

Educational talking videos and voiceovers

Before-and-after transformations

Reaction and commentary videos

Business and training content for professionals

Performance Expectations



Success in this role means:



Delivering multiple high-quality videos per day

Maintaining consistency in style and formatting

Meeting deadlines reliably

Improving speed and efficiency over time

Producing content that supports engagement and conversion

Requirements

Experience editing short-form content (TikTok, Reels, or Shorts)

Ability to handle high-volume editing workloads

Strong sense of pacing and viewer attention

Ability to follow instructions and brand guidelines precisely

Reliable internet connection and consistent availability

Clear written English for captions and communication

Preferred Qualifications

Experience editing social media or UGC-style content

Understanding of retention and hook optimization

Familiarity with beauty, skincare, or clinical content

Basic motion graphics or animation skills

Tools



You should be comfortable using:



CapCut, Adobe Premiere Pro, or similar software

Google Drive or Dropbox

Slack or similar communication platforms

Work Structure

Full-time (40 hours per week)

Consistent daily workflow and content pipeline

You may occasionally support a second brand with similar content needs, using the same systems and editing style

Growth Opportunity



This role can evolve into:



Lead video editor

Content manager

Editor team lead



We are building a long-term content engine and are looking for someone who can grow with the team.



Compensation

Approximately $5/hour (based on experience and performance)

Stable, full-time workload

Opportunities for increased responsibility and compensation over time

Application Instructions



Please include:



Links to your best short-form video edits (TikTok, Reels, or Shorts)

Editing software you use

Internet speed (screenshot preferred)

Weekly availability

A brief note answering:

“Why are you a good fit for a high-volume editing role?”

Additional Notes



This role is best suited for someone who is reliable, detail-oriented, and comfortable working at a consistent pace. Candidates should be able to handle repetition while maintaining quality and attention to detail.

title: Sales Strategist
description:
Job Description: Sales Strategist (Growth-Focused)



Overview

We are a growing digital marketing agency seeking a Sales Strategist to design, execute, and continuously improve our sales generation systems. This is a high-ownership, hands-on role that combines strategic planning with direct execution.



We are specifically looking for someone who wants to grow with the company long-term. As revenue scales and systems mature, this role is intended to evolve into a senior sales leadership position with increased compensation, authority, and responsibility.



This role is fully remote and intended for candidates based in the Philippines.



Key Responsibilities



• Develop and refine outbound sales strategies to generate consistent new business

• Define ideal customer profiles (ICPs), target industries, and buyer personas

• Design and execute outbound funnels (cold
, LinkedIn outreach, partnerships, follow-ups)

• Research and build high-quality lead lists using appropriate tools

• Create, test, and optimize messaging, scripts, and sales cadences

• Execute outreach campaigns and manage active prospect conversations

• Qualify prospects and book or conduct sales calls

• Maintain accurate CRM records and pipeline reporting

• Analyze campaign performance and continuously improve conversion rates

• Collaborate with leadership on positioning, offer refinement, and growth planning



Performance Expectations



• Consistent generation of qualified sales opportunities

• Measurable improvement in response, conversion, and close rates

• Ownership of testing, experimentation, and documented learnings

• Contribution to scalable and repeatable sales systems

• Increasing revenue contribution over time



Compensation



Base Pay:

$10 per hour



High performers will see total compensation grow significantly as deal volume increases. As the company scales, compensation structure and leadership opportunities will expand accordingly.



Qualifications

• Proven experience in outbound sales, business development, or sales strategy

• Strong written and verbal English communication skills

• Comfortable with cold outreach and handling rejection

• Ability to work independently and take full ownership of results

• Familiarity with CRM systems and sales automation tools

• Experience working with digital marketing or service-based businesses is a strong advantage



Work Arrangement

• Part-time, remote position

• Philippines-based candidates preferred

• Long-term opportunity with leadership growth potential



Why Join Root Pages?

We Value You & Your Time

Your best work happens when you feel supported, rested, and respected. We are committed to creating an environment where you can thrive both professionally and personally. Work-life balance is encouraged and protected.



Paid Time Off & Holidays

• 12 Paid Philippine Holidays

• 1 Paid Company Holiday

• 7 Paid Sick Days (Accrued)



Flexible Scheduling

Life requires flexibility. We accommodate reasonable schedule adjustments when possible. With advance notice and manager approval, we work together to support both your personal responsibilities and team performance.



Weathering Storms Together

During extreme weather events, we provide active support to ensure stability for you and your family. Your well-being remains a priority in every season.



Growth Opportunity

This role offers long-term growth potential as the company scales. High performers may advance into senior client success or operations leadership positions.



How to Apply

Please include your resume, a short paragraph explaining why you are a strong fit, an example of how you improved communication or processes in a previous role, your expected hourly rate (PHP), and the word 'Coordinator' in your subject line.

title: Australian Buyer’s Agent Research VA (Experienced Only – Must Have Worked With Australian Buyers Agent)
description:
Job Description



We are an Australian property investment and buyer’s agency business looking for an experienced Property Research VA who has previously worked with an Australian Buyer’s Agent or Property Investment Company.



This is not an entry level role.



If you have not worked in the Australian property industry before, please do not apply.



We are specifically looking for someone who understands how Australian property acquisitions work and can assist with researching investment opportunities, analysing suburbs, and preparing property acquisition reports.



You will be working directly with the principal buyer’s agent to identify high-quality property opportunities and investment strategies.



Accuracy and attention to detail are critical in this role.



Your Responsibilities



You will assist with:



• Suburb and market research across Australian locations

• Identifying subdivision, duplex and granny flat potential

• Analysing zoning and council planning controls

• Reviewing recent comparable sales and rental data

• Preparing property investment research reports

• Assessing development potential and planning restrictions

• Researching off-market and acquisition opportunities

• Supporting the buyer’s agent with property acquisition analysis



This role requires analytical thinking, not just data collection.



Mandatory Experience (Non-Negotiable)



Applicants must meet all of the following criteria:



• Previously worked with an Australian Buyer’s Agent or Property Investment Firm

• Strong understanding of Australian property terminology and processes

• Experience conducting suburb and property investment research

• Ability to prepare structured property research reports

• Familiarity with Australian planning and zoning controls



This role is not suitable for general real estate VAs without Australian experience.



Preferred Tools Experience



Highly regarded if you have experience using Australian property research and planning tools such as:



Property Data Platforms



• CoreLogic / RP Data

• PriceFinder

• 
 and Domain research tools

• SQM Research

• Suburb analytics platforms



Planning & Development Research



• NSW Planning Portal

• Local Council LEP and DCP controls

• DA Tracker systems

• Zoning and minimum lot size analysis

• Section 10.7 Planning Certificates



Mapping & Land Information



• SIX Maps / Spatial Viewer

• Nearmap or aerial mapping tools

• Sewer service diagrams (Sydney Water / Dial Before You Dig)

• Flood and bushfire planning overlays



Market & Rental Analysis



• Comparable sales analysis

• Rental yield analysis

• Vacancy rate research

• Suburb growth trends



Reporting & Research Preparation



• Google Sheets / Excel

• Google Docs

• CRM systems used in Australian real estate



What We Are Looking For



We want someone who is:



• Extremely detail-oriented

• Able to analyse property investment opportunities

• Capable of preparing clear and professional research reports

• Comfortable working independently



This role supports real property acquisitions, so research accuracy is extremely important.



Application Instructions



To apply, please include the following:



The name of the Australian company or buyer’s agent you previously worked for



A sample property or suburb research report you prepared



A short explanation answering this question:



How would you check if a property in NSW allows subdivision or duplex development?



Applications without this information will not be reviewed.



Important



This role is not a training position.



We are specifically looking for someone who has already supported a buyer’s agent in Australia and understands the property research process.

title: Editing VA -Part-time Capcut / TikTok Editor with potential for more
description:
Part-time Capcut / TikTok Editor with potential for more



Hiring for part-time work for a Capcut / TikTok editor



You will be making TikTok videos using Capcut.  The editing process is fairly simple and straightforward.  



Anyone who is proficient in video editing should have no problem with the basic tasks such as:



Cutting dead space in talking head videos

Adding overlay images on screen in the videos

Minor effects such as dynamic zoom, cropping, etc.

Producing, sorting and compiling b-roll content from voiceover and footage provided, having the ability to digest what is being said and pair up the audio with corresponding footage. These are typically fast cuts, that need to be highly engaging. Lots of movement but simple edits. These will be for Tiktok videos and eventually we will repurpose to other platforms.



Please review a few examples of my content to ensure you are familiar and comfortable with the editing style:



Basic talking head - here you are mostly editing dead space and piecing clips together, adding minor effects like crop and zoom to make the frames look more dynamic and seamless.













Talking head with overlays - same as before, but adding images provided to you on the screen to support what is being said in the video.







B-roll content - you will be provided a voice over and need to work through the footage to find fitting visuals. A strong understanding of English and social media content is crucial here.











Skit work- typically these are one take but a lot of times we need to cut videos together if there are mistakes. You need to be able to recognize those mistakes and clear them out to make it a seamless video. 

















You will be working hand in hand with me on an extremely viral social media page and there is room for bonuses if deadlines are met and the content performs well!



Requirements:

Attention to detail

STRONG English

Strong internet connection

Previous experience with Capcut / TikTok / Instagram

Good working with a team

Ability to learn and take constructive feedback

Availability to work 3-4h a day (with potential for more and increased salary)

Can take payments through Wise

title: Video Anchor & Script writer
description:
About the job



Company Description



Ytviews Online Media LLC is a social media marketing and branding company working in more than 20 countries with over 10,000 active clients. The company has been operational since 2017 and has an Alexa ranking of among the top 30,000 websites in the world. We are currently developing 7 new social media products and apps that will be launched in the upcoming days. Please note, we have no direct affiliation with YouTube and Google as we are an independent social media marketing company working via different organic ways.







Role Description



We are seeking a YouTube Video Anchor to create and produce engaging video content for our clients. This is a full-time role based in New Delhi but with flexibility to work remotely. The successful candidate is expected to provide unique video content while developing original ideas and maintaining a consistent style and tone. They will work closely with other teams in the company, including writers, designers, and video editors, to achieve the objectives outlined by clients.







Qualifications



Proven work experience as a Video Anchor

Strong communication skills and the ability to speak clearly and articulately on camera.

Experience with and knowledge of video editing software such as Adobe Premiere Pro and Final Cut Pro

Experience with lighting and sound equipment

Excellent time-management and organizational skills

Ability to create and improve on storyboards and scripts for video content

Ability to work under tight deadlines and with minimal supervision

Understanding of SEO, digital marketing, and video analytics

A portfolio with samples of previous work is a plus

title: SDR - LinkedIn Outreach for AI SaaS Startup
description:
We’re Trustable Labs, an AI visibility platform that shows brands how they appear across ChatGPT, Perplexity, Gemini and other AI platforms.

We need an SDR to own outreach from start to finish:

 ? Source leads on LinkedIn (founders, CEOs, Heads of Marketing/SEO at agencies and brands)

You will be given the message scripts, target filters, and daily targets. We don’t need you to write copy. We need you to send volume and manage replies.

title: Operations Coordinator / Customer Success
description:
POSITION OVERVIEW

The Operations Coordinator owns the daily operational rhythm of REVAMP Visuals. Acting as the central hub between field teams, editors, customer service, and leadership, this role ensures every project is executed efficiently, communicated clearly, and delivered to brand standards.



This position requires decisive coordination, proactive problem-solving, and systems thinking. The Operations Coordinator not only manages logistics but continuously improves workflows, strengthens accountability, and safeguards the client experience as the company scales.



Working hours are 9:00am - 5:00pm Eastern Time with a 1 hour lunch break.



Summary

The Operations Coordinator will play a pivotal role in the day-to-day operations of our organization. This individual will support the smooth execution of our production projects and daily operations, ensuring everything runs seamlessly from pre-production to post-production. This role is ideal for someone passionate about media and production, with strong organizational and communication skills, and a proactive approach. The ideal candidate will possess strong leadership capabilities, a strong customer service background, and a track record of achieving operational excellence.



CORE RESPONSIBILITIES



Daily

Manage and oversee internal scheduling for Media Pros and editors

Coordinate and dispatch same-day or next-day urgent changes

Update project timelines and appointment calendars

Route client communication to appropriate tea
mbers and track resolution

Ensure client response times remain within 10–20 minutes during operating hours

Set clear next-day follow-ups when needed

Lead and manage client communications to ensure proactive updates

Oversee and adjust team schedules across departments (Field, Editing, Customer Service)

Support Quality Control workflows to uphold brand and delivery standards

Funnel important updates from field teams and clients into centralized systems

Provide consultative support on upgrades and service options



Weekly

Host weekly team sync meetings to review bottlenecks, timelines, and priorities

Lead weekly task check-ins and monitor internal accountability

Report on project statuses and departmental KPIs

Coordinate with cross-functional teams (Creative, Customer Service, Sales)

Analyze recurring project issues and propose system improvements

Support onboarding of new tea
mbers and freelancers

Contribute to lead generation or outreach initiatives as requested



Monthly

Compile and report on key performance metrics (revenue, retention, production success, workflow health)

Identify trends in client requests or operational inefficiencies

Implement system, communication, and quality improvements

Review and document SOP updates to maintain operational standards

Participate in monthly strategic planning and forecasting sessions

Support hiring, onboarding, and training initiatives



KEY PERFORMANCE INDICATORS (KPIs)

Client response time compliance

On-time project completion rate

Quality control pass rate

Schedule accuracy and resource allocation efficiency

Reduction in recurring workflow issues

Team accountability follow-through

Client satisfaction and retention



SKILLS & QUALIFICATIONS

Strong operational and project coordination experience

Excellent written and verbal communication skills

High proficiency in CRM systems, Google Workspace, and scheduling tools

Ability to manage multiple workflows simultaneously

Experience leading cross-department collaboration

Strong organizational and time management skills

Proactive problem solver with systems-thinking mindset

Comfortable managing deadlines and high-volume production environments



To Apply

Please send us the following:

A 1–2 minute video introducing yourself — tell us where you’re from, what kind of work you’ve done before, and why you’re a great fit for this Operations Coordinator / Customer Success role.

Confirmation that you are available to work 9:00am–5:00pm Eastern Time, Monday through Friday.

A screenshot of your internet speed test and your OnlineJobs.ph DISC Profile.

One or two sentences answering: “What makes a great client experience?”



We’re excited to meet you — bonus points if your video shows energy, professionalism, and clear communication.

title: Executive Assistant to Founder (Operations + Execution Focus)
description:
I’m looking for a highly organized, execution-driven Executive Assistant who can turn conversations into action and keep projects moving without constant supervision.

Keep Google Drive clean and organized (especially systems documentation)

title: Product Researcher
description:
We are a up and coming e-commerce brand looking for a sharp, trend-obsessed Product Researcher to join our team. Your mission is to identify "winning" products before they go mainstream. You will be responsible for scouting high-potential products, analyzing competitor data, and identifying the "visual hooks" that will make a product viral on TikTok and Shopify.



Key Responsibilities:



- Trend Scouting: Scour TikTok Creative Center, Minea, PiPiADS, and organic FYP feeds to find products with high engagement and "problem-solving" appeal.

- Competitor Analysis: Identify top-selling stores, analyze their pricing strategy, and find "gaps" where we can offer a better version or better marketing.

- Data Validation: Use tools like AliShark or Shophunter to verify sales volume and demand trends for 2026.

- Creative Briefing: For every product found, you must identify at least three "3-second hooks" that would work for a TikTok ad.

- Daily Reporting: Maintain a structured Google Sheet/Notion database with 5–10 vetted product leads per week.





Required Skills & Tools:



- Software Proficient: Experience with Minea, AutoDS, TikTok Shop Analytics, and Shopify.

- Trend Literacy: You understand the difference between a "fad" and a "scalable trend" (e.g., Biohacking, Aesthetic Home, Sensory Wellness).

- AI Integration: Ability to use Gemini or ChatGPT to quickly summarize product benefits and customer pain points.



Efficiency: Ability to work independently and meet strict daily research quotas.



Why Join Us?



Remote Work: 100% virtual position.

Scalability focus: We are moving from dropshipping to an owned brand; you will be a key part of our growth.

Performance Bonuses: Weekly bonuses for every "winner" product that hits a specific sales milestone.

title: Amazon Launch / ECommerce Operations Manager
description:
Please read carefully, this is NOT a Amazon listing optimization or VA role. 



About the Role

We’re looking for an experienced Amazon Brand Launch Manager to oversee the full setup and launch of two separate food brands on Amazon. This role involves coordinating everything from Brand Registry setup to packaging consulting, logistics, and listing. This is equal project management, consulting and operations. You should be deeply familiar with Amazon Seller Central, FBA shipping workflows, and food product compliance.



This is a project-based contract role with potential for ongoing work as we expand.



Responsibilities



-Manage end-to-end Amazon brand launches for two separate food brands with multiple SKUS. 

-Set up Seller Central accounts and complete Brand Registry enrollment

-Create, upload, and optimize product listings (SKUs, keywords, descriptions, imagery, A+ content) We can help with design. Suggest bundles

- Consult and oversee pallet and shipment preparation to Amazon fulfillment centers (FBA)

-Ensure correct carton/pallet labeling is correct

-Monitor first shipments for receiving and inventory accuracy

-Provide clear project timelines, updates, and documentation for each step

-Troubleshoot any Amazon listing or shipping issues that come up during launch



Qualifications

Proven experience launching and managing food or CPG brands on Amazon (FBA experience required)

Strong knowledge of Amazon Brand Registry, packaging compliance, and FBA requirements

Familiar with SKU management, barcodes (UPC/FNSKU), and inventory systems

Excellent project management and communication skills

Detail-oriented and highly organized

Comfortable collaborating with designers and manufacturers on packaging and labeling



Bonus Experience



Familiarity with pallet logistics 





Contract Details

Project-based role (approx. 2–3 months)

Flexible remote schedule, strong communication required

Compensation based on experience and project scope



How to Apply

Respond to this listing with the subject “Amazon Brand Launch Manager – [Your Name]” 



A short paragraph on your past experience launching Amazon brands

Example listings or case studies (preferred)

Hourly or project-based rate

title: Brand & Content Manager — U.S. Medical Practice ($1,400–$1,600/mo, Full-Time)
description:
We believe people suffer because they're misaligned — with their biology, their purpose, and the systems they live inside. 



Our work is about changing that.



This is a U.S.-based psychiatric practice led by an Ivy League-trained female physician specializing in women's mental health, hormonal health, and complex diagnostic care. We help women understand their own design and align with the highest version of themselves — biologically, psychologically, and spiritually. 



The practice is supported by an all-women operations team.



We are building a brand that carries this mission to a much larger audience — through content that educates, positions, and converts. Not influencer content. Not wellness content. Physician-led authority content that helps the right people find us and arrive ready to commit.



We need the person who will own that brand's content presence. Someone who believes in this mission enough to protect it.



How we work:

The founder directs the vision. AI scaffolds our thinking — generating drafts, analyzing trends, multiplying content across platforms. Nobody here stops thinking. Your role is to execute with judgment, taste, and precision. You take AI-generated output and the founder's original material, refine it to meet the brand standard, and make sure it reaches the right audience on the right platform at the right time.

You are not replaced by AI. You manage AI. As tools evolve, you adopt them, integrate them into the workflow, and remain the human quality gate that ensures nothing goes live that doesn't serve the mission.



What a typical week looks like:

— Take the founder's monthly long-form videos and voice memos and repurpose them into 8-12 short-form clips (YouTube Shorts, Reels, Instagram) using AI tools, then refine and approve each one

— Format and schedule 1-2 Substack newsletters from the founder's essays or voice memos

— Design 4-6 carousels, quote cards, and branded graphics across LinkedIn, X, Instagram

— Build and maintain
 marketing sequences — automated nurture flows, segmentation, and campaigns that grow the list and convert audience into patients

— Review all AI-generated content for brand voice, accuracy, and quality before posting

— Schedule and post across LinkedIn, Substack, X, Instagram, and YouTube

— Track weekly performance metrics and bring data-backed recommendations on what's working

— Kill anything that doesn't meet the standard before it goes public

Requirements:

— C1/C2 English (written and verbal) — non-negotiable

— 3+ years in content production and brand building — professional services, luxury, health, or thought leadership preferred. E-commerce alone does not qualify. If you've done this work but your title didn't reflect it, we still want to hear from you.

— Fluency across LinkedIn, Instagram, YouTube, X, and a newsletter platform (Substack preferred)

—
 marketing experience — automated sequences, audience segmentation, conversion-focused strategy

— Video editing proficiency (CapCut, Premiere Pro, DaVinci Resolve, or Final Cut)

— AI content and video tool experience (OpusClip, Vizard, Descript, HeyGen, Synthesia, Runway, Canva AI, or similar)

— Strong Canva or Figma skills

— SEO and discoverability knowledge — YouTube optimization, keyword strategy

— Portfolio showing premium, restrained brand work — clean and authoritative, not flashy

— Central Time hours (Mon–Fri, 8 AM–5 PM CT)



Nice to have: Podcast production, motion graphics.



Compensation: $1,400–$1,600/month based on experience. Long-term position. Leadership-track role that grows into Director of Content & Brand as the practice scales toward book publication, a national podcast, and speaking engagements. The brand you build here becomes your signature work.

Hiring process: Selected candidates begin with a paid trial period before moving into the full role.



To apply, send ALL of the following:

1) Portfolio — live account links to feeds you manage or have managed preferred. If not available, send a comprehensive portfolio showing actual content you've created across platforms.

2) Voice memo or Loom video (2–3 min, English) — introduce yourself, tell us about a brand you built or managed, and explain the difference between an authority brand and a visibility brand.

3) Resume.



Only complete applications will be reviewed.



This brand exists because the world needs a better way to help people align with who they actually are. If that resonates — and your standard is "is this the best version of what this brand would say?" before anything goes live — apply.

ABOUT THE COMPANY

We’re a fast-moving founding team backed by real revenue from our e-commerce portfolio and owned media properties. This is a ground-floor opportunity at a company building category-defining software.





THE ROLE

You’ll be the engine behind our sales pipeline. Our Head of Sales needs a sharp, detail-oriented operator who can research prospects, qualify leads, manage CRM data, and ensure every outreach sequence runs like clockwork. You won’t be cold calling or closing deals — you’ll be building the infrastructure that makes closing possible.





CORE RESPONSIBILITIES

Source and research prospects using 
, LinkedIn Sales Navigator, and company websites

Score and qualify leads against our Ideal Customer Profile (ICP) using documented criteria

Enrich contact records with company size, tech stack, key decision-maker details, and recent news

Maintain CRM hygiene in ClickUp — update statuses, log activities, tag leads by stage

Prepare pre-call research briefs for the Head of Sales before discovery calls

Monitor inbox replies to outbound sequences and classify response intent (interested, objection, OOO, bounce, not interested)

Track outbound sequence performance metrics (open rates, reply rates, meeting conversion)

Assist with drafting personalized
 sequences following approved templates and brand voice

Maintain and update sales playbook documentation as processes evolve

REQUIRED SKILLS & EXPERIENCE

2+ years in sales operations, lead generation, or SDR support role

Proficient with 
 or similar prospecting tools (ZoomInfo, Lusha, Hunter)

Experience with CRM systems (ClickUp, HubSpot, Salesforce, or Pipedrive)

Strong English written communication — you will draft research briefs and
 copy

Reliable internet connection and a quiet workspace





BONUS SKILLS (NOT REQUIRED)

Experience in SaaS, digital marketing, or agency environments

Familiarity with LinkedIn Sales Navigator advanced search

Experience with AI tools (ChatGPT, Claude) for research acceleration

Basic understanding of SEO, digital advertising, or e-commerce





COMPENSATION & DETAILS

title: Microsoft Word Reporting Specialist
description:
We are looking for a highly detail-oriented Virtual Assistant to assist with preparing methamphetamine contamination reports using our templates. The role involves compiling field data, photos, and notes provided by our technicians into clean, professional reports. This includes inserting and labelling photos, transferring sampling results, and ensuring all formatting is accurate and consistent.



You will also be required to convert hand-drawn floor plans into clear, computer-generated layouts to be included in reports.



This is a process-driven role where accuracy, speed, and attention to detail are critical. You must be highly advanced in Microsoft Word, including the ability to efficiently insert and format large volumes of photos (typically 40–60 images per report) while maintaining a clean, consistent layout.



This role will start part-time, with the opportunity to transition to full-time over the coming months for the right person.



This is an ongoing role with consistent weekly work. We are looking for someone reliable, efficient, and capable of delivering professional work with minimal revisions.

 Send the name of the business you created so we can review your work

WHAT YOU WILL EDIT



Meta ads (UGC and direct response)

Short-form videos for Reels, TikTok, and Shorts

Product demos and comparisons

12-hour shift storytelling

Before and after pain-relief visuals



WHAT YOU MUST UNDERSTAND



How to visually communicate comfort and support

How to make shoes feel like relief on screen

How to edit for nurses and healthcare audiences

How to keep videos raw, real, and trustworthy

How to pace edits for conversions (fast hooks, clear captions)



No influencer-style fluff

No stock-footage feeling

No slow cinematic intros

Proven DTC ad editing experience

Experience with footwear or medical / health products

Strong understanding of Meta ad creatives

Other AI-assisted video generation or enhancement tools



WORK AND PAY



40 hours per week

Long-term role

Paid test assignment





HOW TO APPLY



Send the following:

Your portfolio (DTC ads only)

Why do most DTC footwear ads fail, and how would you fix them?



Applications without relevant examples will be ignored.

title: Graphic Designer – Proof Team
description:
About the Role

We are looking for an exceptional Graphic Designer to join our Proof Team — not just to fill a seat, but to raise the bar.

This role is critical to our operations. You will be responsible for creating precise, production-ready artwork proofs for promotional and customizable products. Accuracy, speed, and attention to detail are non-negotiable.

We are not hiring for volume — we are hiring for quality. We are looking for designers who take pride in pixel-perfect layouts, technical precision, and delivering flawless proofs that move seamlessly into production.



What You’ll Be Responsible For

Creating accurate artwork proofs for client approval

Preparing print-ready files that meet all technical specifications

Ensuring correct sizing, bleed, color mode (CMYK/RGB), and resolution

Maintaining strict alignment with client brand guidelines

Reviewing layouts for spacing, typography, and visual consistency

Managing multiple proofs daily without compromising quality

Collaborating with Sales, Design, and Production teams to avoid errors and delays



What We’re Looking For

Strong foundation in graphic design principles

Advanced proficiency in Adobe Illustrator (mandatory)

Solid working knowledge of Adobe Photoshop

Experience working with product templates and print specifications

Deep understanding of print-ready file preparation

Exceptional attention to detail — you catch what others miss

Ability to work efficiently under deadline pressure

Strong communication skills in a remote environment



Ideal Candidate

You are:

Detail-obsessed and process-driven

Comfortable handling repetitive tasks with consistent accuracy

Proactive in identifying potential production issues before they happen

Open to feedback and continuous improvement

Reliable and accountable in a 24/7 operational setup



Work Schedule

6 working days per week

1 rest day (Saturday or Sunday CDT)

Fixed 8-hour shifts

24/7 operations (schedule may vary based on business needs)

title: PAID MEDIA SPECIALIST (Google Ads + Meta Ads)
description:
PAID MEDIA SPECIALIST (Google Ads + Meta Ads)

Company: Graystone Consulting (US-based fractional CMO practice)

Location: Remote (Philippines)

Hours: 25-30 hours/week, flexible schedule with some US Eastern overlap

Type: Long-term contractor



About Us



Graystone Consulting is a fractional CMO and growth operations firm based in Lexington, Kentucky. We work with B2B SaaS companies and hospitality brands in the $3M to $50M revenue range. You would report directly to our Founder and work across multiple client accounts managing paid media execution.



What You Will Do

You will own day-to-day execution of Google Ads and Meta Ads across 2-3 client accounts:



1. Build, launch, and optimize Google Ads campaigns (Search, Performance Max, Shopping, Display)

2. Build, launch, and optimize Meta Ads campaigns (prospecting, retargeting, lookalike audiences)

3. Manage combined monthly ad spend of $30K+ across accounts

4. Set up and validate conversion tracking (Google Tag Manager, GA4, Meta CAPI/Pixel)

5. Conduct daily bid adjustments, search term reviews, and budget pacing

6. Refresh ad creative (text overlays, asset group updates) and flag fatigue

7. Build weekly performance reports in Google Sheets with actionable recommendations

8. Coordinate with agency partners on creative asset delivery

9. Support new client onboarding by auditing existing ad accounts and building campaign structures from scratch



Current Client Context



Client 1: National fast-casual restaurant brand, PMax + Meta, multi-location targeting across NYC, Boston, Philadelphia

Client 2: B2B SaaS company, Google Search + Meta retargeting launch



Future clients onboarded through our Growth Operating System methodology (you would build their paid media infrastructure)



Required Skills



- 3+ years hands-on Google Ads management (Search, PMax, Shopping required)

- 2+ years hands-on Meta Ads management (prospecting + retargeting structures)

- Google Tag Manager setup and troubleshooting

- GA4 configuration and conversion tracking validation

- Google Sheets reporting (pivot tables, VLOOKUP, dashboard building)

- Experience managing $10K+/mo in combined ad spend

- Written English fluency for reporting and async communication



Strongly Preferred



- Google Ads certification (Search, Display, or Shopping)

- Experience with restaurant, hospitality, or multi-location businesses

- Experience with B2B SaaS lead generation campaigns

- Familiarity with ClickUp or similar project management tools

- Meta Conversions API (CAPI) implementation experience



Tools You Will Use

Google Ads, Meta Ads Manager, Google Tag Manager, GA4, Google Sheets, ClickUp, Slack



How to Apply

Send a message with:



1. A brief description of the largest Google Ads account you have managed (monthly budget and campaign types)

2. A specific example of a campaign you optimized and the result (ROAS improvement, CPA reduction, etc.)

3. Your available hours per week and preferred working hours

4. Your hourly rate in USD

title: Sales Dialer
description:
TL;DR

Role: Sales Caller (Dialer)

Pay: $1,200 USD Guaranteed Base. With bonuses, you can earn over $2,000 USD.

Schedule: You must work from 6:00 AM to 3:00 PM GMT+8 EVERY DAY but weekends we have lesser traffic.

Client Revenue: The business makes $270,000 USD per month.

Job: You call 100+ people a day. You are fast. You are diligent.

Tracking: We do not screenshot your computer. We only care about your results.

Requirement: You must send a voice note or video to apply.



Job Title: High-Volume Sales Caller



What Is This Job? (Read This First)

We are an education company. We sell a program that teaches people how to start online businesses. The program costs $5,000.



Our company makes $270,000 USD every month. We have too many people asking for help and not enough people to call them.



We need a "Dialer." Your job is to call these people on the phone. You are the engine. You call them fast. You make sure they are real. You help them buy our small $7 course if they cannot afford the big one.



Who You Are



Experience: You do not need experience in this specific industry. You just need a proven history of being diligent (hard-working).



Fast & Punctual: You are always on time. You move fast.



Open To Learn: You listen to feedback and get better every day.



Tech: You have fast internet and a quiet room.



The Work Culture

We do not treat you like a baby.



We do not track your hours.



We do not record your screen.



All we care about is: How fast did you call? and What happened on the call?



The Schedule



Time: 6:00 AM to 3:00 PM GMT+8.



This is non-negotiable. This is when our customers pick up the phone.



What You Will Do (The Daily Work)



Call Fast: When a new person signs up, you call them in 5 minutes.



Call A Lot: You will dial the phone 100 to 300 times a day. Most calls are short.



Sell The Small Stuff: If someone cannot afford $5,000, you sell them our $7 course. You do not let them leave with nothing.



Check In: You call students on Day 3 and Day 6 of their course to see if they are doing the work.



The Rules (No Excuses)



Speed Rule: You call new leads in 5 minutes. We track this automatically.



Note Rule: You write a note in the computer (CRM) for every call. If you don't write it, you don't get paid.



The Money



Base Pay: $1,200 USD per month. This is guaranteed if you do the work.



Bonuses: We have many bonuses for hitting targets. Your pay can easily stack up to $2,000 USD.



How To Apply (Mandatory)

Do not just send a CV. We will ignore it.



Record a Loom video OR a Voice Note (in Messenger).



Answer this specific question: "Tell me why you can be diligent and dependable, and cite an example of when you were diligent and dependable in the past."



Send the video/audio with your application.



If you do not send the recording, you will not get the job.
